title: On the limits of the energetic coupling between field dislocation mechanics and phase field crystal
abstract: This paper investigates the energetic coupling between Field Dislocation Mechanics (FDM) and the Phase Field Crystal (PFC) model proposed in Phys. Rev. B 102, 064109, 2020. While FDM correctly solves the initial boundary value problem of a continuum body with dislocation fields, PFC captures the underlying crystallographic structure. The coupling, which penalizes the $L^2$ distance between elastic distortion from FDM and configurational distortion from PFC in the $L^2$ sense, had been proposed to reconcile dislocation mechanics with crystallography in a single continuum framework. Variational analysis reveals that the coupling term acts as a divergence-driven forcing in the phase-field evolution that matches only the compatible (curl-free) parts of the distortion fields. Consequently, its contributions are insensitive to the incompatible (divergence-free) elastic distortion carrying all the information on dislocation topology. Furthermore, the nature of the configurational distortion causes mechanical boundary conditions to be transmitted diffusively from FDM to PFC rather than elastically. Numerical simulations demonstrate that this coupling cannot prevent the unnatural core spreading in FDM. Finally, it is shown that even in the most general case, an energetic coupling suffers from the same drawbacks, which limits its ability to integrate dislocation mechanics with crystallography.
summary:
本文研究了场位错力学（FDM）和物理学中提出的相场晶体（PFC）模型之间的能量耦合。 Rev. B 102, 064109, 2020。虽然 FDM 正确解决了具有位错场的连续体的初始边值问题，但 PFC 捕获了底层晶体结构。这种耦合在 $L^2$ 意义上对 FDM 的弹性畸变和 PFC 的构型畸变之间的 $L^2$ 距离进行惩罚，已被提议在单个连续体框架中协调位错力学与晶体学。变分分析表明，耦合项在相场演化中充当发散驱动力，仅与畸变场的兼容（无卷曲）部分匹配。因此，它的贡献对携带位错拓扑所有信息的不相容（无散度）弹性变形不敏感。此外，构形畸变的性质导致机械边界条件从 FDM 扩散而不是弹性地传递到 PFC。

数值模拟表明这种耦合不能阻止 FDM 中不自然的纤芯扩散。最后，研究表明，即使在最一般的情况下，能量耦合也存在同样的缺点，这限制了其将位错力学与晶体学相结合的能力。

title: First passage time distribution in underdamped harmonic oscillators
abstract: We derive the distribution of the first passage time $t_{fp}$ for the position $x$ of an underdamped harmonic oscillator to overcome a threshold $x_B$. As the $t_{fp}$ distribution depends on the oscillator quality factor $Q$ different approaches are used. At very large quality factor ($Q\gg 100$) and intermediate and long $t_{fp}$ the proof is based on an energy diffusion model, whereas at medium quality factor ($Q\sim 10$) the proof is based on the study of the eigenvalues of the Kramers linear differential operator with absorbing boundary conditions. For all $Q$ and short $t_{fp}$ we use a Hamiltonian approximation. The theoretical predictions are in excellent agreement with direct numerical simulations of underdamped oscillator dynamics. Finally we show that the mean of the trajectories ending at $t_{fp}$ presents a particular shape driven by a specific noise pattern.
summary: 我们推导出欠阻尼谐振子位置 $x$ 的首次通过时间 $t_{fp}$ 的分布，以克服阈值 $x_B$。由于 $t_{fp}$ 分布取决于振荡器品质因数 $Q$，因此使用了不同的方法。在非常大的品质因数 ($Q\gg 100$) 和中长 $t_{fp}$ 下，证明基于能量扩散模型，而在中等品质因数 ($Q\sim 10$) 下，证明基于具有吸收边界条件的 Kramers 线性微分算子的特征值的研究。对于所有 $Q$ 和短 $t_{fp}$，我们使用哈密顿近似。理论预测与欠阻尼振荡器动力学的直接数值模拟非常吻合。最后，我们表明以 $t_{fp}$ 结尾的轨迹的平均值呈现出由特定噪声模式驱动的特定形状。

title: Vitriflow: calibrated amorphous structure ensembles from melt-quench simulation
abstract: Melt--quench molecular dynamics is widely used to construct amorphous materials models, but the resulting ensemble is defined by choices that are often made implicitly: numerical settings, melt temperature, liquid-hold time, quench rate, system size, and post-generation screening. We introduce vitriflow, a computational materials methodology that turns these choices into an explicit decision chain. The framework couples numerical stability, descriptor-based protocol calibration, user-defined artefact screening, and statistical convergence of the generated analysis ensemble in a material-specific descriptor space. We demonstrate the approach for a-SiO$_2$, a-Si$_3$N$_4$, and a-Sm$_2$O$_3$, which respectively test tetrahedral network fidelity, MG2 $\rightarrow$ PBE $\rightarrow$ HSE06 DFT refinement of a heteropolar nitride, and amorphous/crystal discrimination in a mixed-coordination rare-earth oxide. vitriflow separates defect-free from oxygen-bridge-defective silica, quantifies DFT-refinement response in a common a-Si$_3$N$_4$ structural population, and removes recrystallised Sm$_2$O$_3$ structures without imposing fixed coordination. The result is a reproducible route for generating amorphous ensembles whose numerical settings, thermal protocol, screening actions, and statistical precision are selected from the materials question rather than assumed a priori.
summary:
熔融-淬火分子动力学广泛用于构建非晶材料模型，但最终的整体是由通常隐含的选择来定义的：数值设置、熔融温度、液体保持时间、淬火速率、系统尺寸和生成后筛选。我们引入了 vitriflow，一种计算材料方法，可将这些选择转化为明确的决策链。该框架将数值稳定性、基于描述符的协议校准、用户定义的伪影筛选以及在特定材料描述符空间中生成的分析集合的统计收敛结合起来。我们演示了 a-SiO$_2$、a-Si$_3$N$_4$ 和 a-Sm$_2$O$_3$ 的方法，分别测试四面体网络保真度、异极氮化物的 MG2 $\rightarrow$ PBE $\rightarrow$ HSE06 DFT 细化以及混合配位稀土氧化物中的非晶/晶体辨别。 vitriflow 可将无缺陷的二氧化硅与有氧桥缺陷的二氧化硅分离，量化常见 a-Si$_3$N$_4$ 结构群中的 DFT 细化响应，并在不施加固定配位的情况下去除再结晶的 Sm$_2$O$_3$ 结构。

结果是生成非晶系综的可重复途径，其数值设置、热协议、筛选操作和统计精度是从材料问题中选择的，而不是先验假设的。

title: Generalized quantum geometry formulated through interacting vertex correlations
abstract: Quantum geometry characterizes the variation of electron wavefunctions in solids along a parameter space. Conventionally, crystal momentum is chosen as the parameter, since it couples to electromagnetic fields, offering an interpretation of quantum geometry in terms of dipole matrix elements, polarization fluctuations, and optical responses. However, Bloch momentum is not the only possible parameter space in which a wavefunction can evolve. In this work, we show that quantum geometry can be extended beyond the bare Bloch-band geometry to manifolds whose adiabatic parameters represent deformations of the ground state, including collective bosonic fluctuations, external fields, or structural distortions. We show that the generalized quantum geometric tensor is encoded by correlations of interacting vertices, conjugate to the deformation parameters. By way of illustration, we briefly discuss the application of these extended geometric concepts to manifolds generated by Hubbard-Stratonovich bosonic fields, or Jahn-Teller configurational spaces. The formulation presented here is framed by general manifolds, which extend quantum geometry to generic structural, collective, and interactive many-body systems.
summary:
量子几何描述了固体中电子波函数沿参数空间的变化。传统上，选择晶体动量作为参数，因为它与电磁场耦合，提供了偶极子矩阵元素、偏振涨落和光学响应方面的量子几何解释。然而，布洛赫动量并不是波函数可以演化的唯一可能的参数空间。在这项工作中，我们证明量子几何可以扩展到裸露的布洛赫带几何之外，其绝热参数代表基态的变形，包括集体玻色涨落、外部场或结构扭曲。我们证明了广义量子几何张量是由相互作用的顶点的相关性编码的，与变形参数共轭。通过举例说明，我们简要讨论了这些扩展几何概念在 Hubbard-Stratonovich 玻色子场或 Jahn-Teller 配置空间生成的流形中的应用。

这里提出的公式是由通用流形构成的，它将量子几何扩展到通用结构、集体和交互式多体系统。

title: Elasto-Hydrodynamic Propulsion of a Magnetically Actuated Filament
abstract: We investigate the low-Reynolds-number propulsion of a slender elastic filament with a dipolar magnetic head actuated by an oscillating field in a viscous fluid by studying its strokes and net forward motion. To capture these dynamics, we employ an elasto-hydrodynamic (EH) framework that couples Euler-Bernoulli beam mechanics with resistive force theory. Unlike prescribed-kinematics models, filament shapes here emerge self-consistently from the actuation and the force and torque boundary conditions (BCs). We demonstrate that viscous boundary contributions are crucial for quantitative agreement and show that the swimming dynamics are governed by the EH length and a magneto-viscous-elastic stroke amplitude introduced here. The swimming speed is non-monotonic with increasing ratio of the swimmer length to the EH length, and is shown to reach a maximum when the swimmer length is on the order of the EH length. We further discuss the analytical limit in which the tail BCs can be described as free, and the limitations that arise when viscous contributions to the BCs are ignored.
summary: 我们通过研究粘性流体中振荡场驱动的带有偶极磁头的细长弹性丝的冲程和净向前运动来研究其低雷诺数推进。为了捕捉这些动力学，我们采用了弹流动力学 (EH) 框架，将欧拉-伯努利梁力学与阻力理论结合起来。与规定的运动学模型不同，这里的细丝形状从驱动以及力和扭矩边界条件 (BC) 中自洽地出现。我们证明了粘性边界的贡献对于定量一致性至关重要，并表明游泳动力学受 EH 长度和此处引入的磁粘弹性行程幅度的控制。随着游泳者长度与EH长度之比的增加，游泳速度是非单调的，并且当游泳者长度在EH长度的量级时达到最大值。我们进一步讨论尾部 BC 可以被描述为自由的分析极限，以及忽略对 BC 的粘性贡献时出现的限制。

title: Mixing induced by microswimmers as probed by mutual information
abstract: We investigate fluid mixing induced by microswimmers using mutual information as a global, information-theoretic measure of mixing efficiency. For a two-dimensional squirmer model in a confined domain, we compute numerically the swimmer-generated flows and solve the advection-diffusion equation for the transport of tracer particles in the fluid. We show that the spatial distribution of swimmers strongly affects mixing, which is suppressed by swimmer aggregation and enhanced by positional and orientational disorder. At fixed energy dissipation, mixing efficiency depends non-monotonically on the squirmer parameter, with an optimal finite value arising from the balance between swimmer translation and dipolar flow generation. When hydrodynamic interactions are included, pushers outperform pullers. The mutual information as a function of time decays in three stages: an initial diffusion-dominated stage, an intermediate advection enhanced regime, and a final relaxation stage controlled by system size. Our results demonstrate that mutual information, previously validated as a measure of mixing efficiency only in simplified model systems, can equally be used in complex flows. Its application reveals that mixing by microswimmers is subject to a trade-off between the generation of strong shear flows and achieving optimal dispersion across the fluid domain.
summary:
我们使用互信息作为混合效率的全局信息论测量来研究微型游泳器引起的流体混合。对于受限域中的二维蠕动模型，我们对游泳者产生的流动进行数值计算，并求解流体中示踪粒子传输的平流扩散方程。我们表明，游泳者的空间分布强烈影响混合，这种混合被游泳者聚集所抑制，并因位置和方向的紊乱而增强。在能量耗散固定的情况下，混合效率非单调地取决于蠕动参数，最佳有限值由游动平移和偶极流生成之间的平衡产生。当考虑到流体动力相互作用时，推动器的性能优于拉动器。作为时间函数的互信息分三个阶段衰减：初始扩散主导阶段、中间平流增强阶段和由系统尺寸控制的最终弛豫阶段。我们的结果表明，之前仅在简化模型系统中作为混合效率衡量标准进行验证的互信息同样可以用于复杂的流程。

其应用表明，微型游泳器的混合需要在产生强剪切流和在流体域中实现最佳分散之间进行权衡。

title: Tuning nonlinear waves in nonreciprocal active filaments
abstract: The instabilities of slender structures power biological locomotion across scales, and offer a compelling method to actuate soft robots. Nonreciprocal elastic solids have been found to amplify flexural waves in one direction only, but design principles to tune and stabilize these waves are missing. Here we develop a geometrically exact theory of nonreciprocal filaments and provide simulations that capture their post-instability nonlinear dynamics. We find that nonreciprocity, when coupled to inertia or pre-stress, amplifies and advects curvature variations. The resulting one-way patterns of shape morphing can then be selected via dissipative interactions with the environment. Our work offers a continuum-based strategy for how internal stresses can drive active unidirectional waves without need for additional degrees of freedom.
summary: 细长结构的不稳定性为跨尺度的生物运动提供动力，并提供了一种令人信服的驱动软机器人的方法。人们发现不可逆弹性固体只能放大一个方向的弯曲波，但缺乏调整和稳定这些波的设计原理。在这里，我们开发了一种几何精确的不可逆细丝理论，并提供了捕获其后不稳定非线性动力学的模拟。我们发现，当与惯性或预应力耦合时，非互易性会放大并平流曲率变化。然后可以通过与环境的耗散相互作用来选择由此产生的单向形状变形模式。我们的工作提供了一种基于连续体的策略，用于说明内应力如何驱动主动单向波，而不需要额外的自由度。

title: Many-body benchmarking of DFT local-registry energetics in bilayer InSe
abstract: Density functional theory (DFT) is widely used to model twisted bilayers, but the accuracy of the local stacking energetics underlying such models remains uncertain. Here, we benchmark the local-registry landscape of bilayer InSe using diffusion quantum Monte Carlo (DMC). DFT predicts that AB, AAr, and ABr stackings, which share the same interfacial Se registry, are nearly degenerate within 1.5 meV/f.u. and exhibit nearly indistinguishable DFT charge-density responses. DMC instead separates these stackings by 8(5) and 41(4) meV/f.u., while the energy difference between the most stable and least stable registries reaches 60(7) meV/f.u.. These large energy separations show that the stacking energetics are not determined by the interfacial atomic motif alone but depend on the full registry and its associated many-body electronic response. More broadly, these results show that DFT-based moiré models can substantially underestimate local stacking-energy corrugation, with direct consequences for predicted structural relaxation, domain formation, and electronic reconstruction in twisted layered materials.
summary: 密度泛函理论（DFT）广泛用于模拟扭曲双层，但此类模型背后的局部堆积能量学的准确性仍然不确定。在这里，我们使用扩散量子蒙特卡罗 (DMC) 对双层 InSe 的本地注册景观进行基准测试。 DFT 预测 AB、AAr 和 ABr 堆叠共享相同的界面 Se 注册表，在 1.5 meV/f.u 内几乎简并。并表现出几乎无法区分的 DFT 电荷密度响应。相反，DMC 将这些堆叠分开 8(5) 和 41(4) meV/f.u.，而最稳定和最不稳定注册处之间的能量差异达到 60(7) meV/f.u.。这些大的能量分离表明，堆叠能量不仅仅由界面原子图案决定，而是取决于完整的注册处及其相关的多体电子响应。更广泛地说，这些结果表明，基于 DFT 的莫尔模型可以大大低估局部堆积能量波纹，对扭曲层状材料中预测的结构弛豫、域形成和电子重建产生直接影响。

title: Evidence for Deconfined Magnetic Order in the Kitaev-$J_3$ Model
abstract: We investigate the Kitaev-$J_3$ honeycomb model using variational Monte Carlo calculations combined with a vison-quasiparticle analysis of the parent Kitaev spin liquid (KSL). We provide evidence for deconfined magnetic phases in which zigzag or antiferromagnetic order coexists with remnant $\mathbb{Z}_2$ topological structure inherited from the KSL. The optimized variational wave functions retain multiple linearly independent topological sectors on a torus, whereas those of conventional ordered phases collapse to a single sector. The vison-quasiparticle analysis shows that magnetic order naturally arises from vison-pair condensation while single visons remain gapped, yielding a microscopic mechanism for magnetic ordering without immediate confinement. The resulting phases further host gapless spinons with multiple Majorana cones, offering a possible microscopic scenario for the anomalous low-temperature longitudinal thermal transport reported in magnetically ordered Kitaev materials such as Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$. Our results reveal a microscopic route to fractionalized magnetism beyond the conventional dichotomy between magnetic order and spin-liquid behavior.
summary: 我们使用变分蒙特卡罗计算结合母体 Kitaev 自旋液体 (KSL) 的视觉准粒子分析来研究 Kitaev-$J_3$ 蜂窝模型。我们提供了解禁磁相的证据，其中之字形或反铁磁序与从 KSL 继承的剩余 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 拓扑结构共存。优化的变分波函数在环面上保留了多个线性独立的拓扑扇区，而传统有序相的拓扑扇区则塌陷为单个扇区。视觉-准粒子分析表明，磁序自然地由视觉对凝聚产生，而单个视觉仍保持间隙，从而产生了一种无需立即限制的磁排序微观机制。由此产生的相进一步包含具有多个马约拉纳锥体的无间隙自旋子，为磁有序 Kitaev 材料（例如 Na$_2$Co$_2$TeO$_6$）中报告的异常低温纵向热传输提供了可能的微观场景。我们的结果揭示了一种超越磁序和自旋液体行为之间的传统二分法的分数化磁性的微观途径。

title: Interaction-rotation driven localization-delocalization of eigenstate in Fock space: An exact diagonalization study on trapped Bose gas
abstract: We investigate the localization-delocalization transition and entanglement structure in a finite system of interacting bosons in non-rotating and rotating cases. The many-body eigenspectrum is obtained via exact diagonalization within subspaces of fixed total angular momentum, and the structure of the ground state is analyzed using the inverse participation ratio (IPR), the Shannon entropy (information entropy) and the von Neumann entanglement entropy. In the non-rotating case, a transition from localized to delocalized behavior is observed with increasing interaction strength. The transition is characterized by a decrease in IPR and a corresponding increase in entropy measures, indicating spread of eigenstate weight over all the basis states in the Hilbert space. The effect becomes more pronounced with increasing number of bosons due to the increase of the Hilbert space dimension. In the presence of rotation, the system is driven further toward delocalization. For moderate angular momentum, the eigenstates exhibit partial spreading, while at higher angular momenta a saturation behavior emerges, where further increase in rotation has a limited effect on the localization properties. However, the saturation weakens with increasing system size, indicating a nontrivial interplay between rotation and number of bosons. The consistent behavior of IPR, information entropy and von Neumann entanglement entropy demonstrates that these measures provide a unified characterization of the localization-delocalization transition. The results highlight the combined role of interaction strength, rotation and number of bosons in driving the system towards delocalized state. We observe a connection between localization-delocalization and entanglement, with localized states exhibiting weaker entanglement and delocalized states showing stronger entanglement.
summary:
我们研究了非旋转和旋转情况下相互作用玻色子有限系统中的局域-离域转变和纠缠结构。通过在固定总角动量的子空间内精确对角化获得多体特征谱，并利用逆参与比（IPR）、香农熵（信息熵）和冯·诺依曼纠缠熵分析基态结构。在非旋转情况下，随着相互作用强度的增加，观察到从局部行为到离域行为的转变。该转变的特征是 IPR 的减少和熵度量的相应增加，表明本征态权重在希尔伯特空间中所有基态上的分布。由于希尔伯特空间维度的增加，随着玻色子数量的增加，这种效应变得更加明显。在存在旋转的情况下，系统被进一步驱动离域。对于中等角动量，本征态表现出部分扩展，而在较高角动量时出现饱和行为，其中旋转的进一步增加对局域化特性的影响有限。

然而，饱和度随着系统尺寸的增加而减弱，这表明旋转和玻色子数量之间存在着重要的相互作用。 IPR、信息熵和冯·诺依曼纠缠熵的一致行为表明这些度量提供了局域化-离域化转变的统一表征。结果强调了相互作用强度、旋转和玻色子数量在驱动系统走向离域状态方面的综合作用。我们观察到局域-离域和纠缠之间的联系，局域态表现出较弱的纠缠，离域态表现出较强的纠缠。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.
summary:
在工程部件表面沉积各种涂层，以提高其在磨损、腐蚀、摩擦和热防护方面的性能，已经成为一种标准做法。沉积金属镍钛形状记忆合金涂层可能是硬质陶瓷涂层的可行替代方案。镍钛涂层具有源自独特功能热机械特性的额外优势。然而，厚镍钛涂层的制造却很困难。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法不适用于 NiTi，最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学不均匀的涂层，不会发生马氏体转变，冷喷涂 NiTi 涂层与基材的附着力较差。在这项工作中，我们报告了首次成功制造厚镍钛涂层（100-300 um），该涂层显示出功能性热机械性能，同时显示出对基材非常好的附着力。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，使用四组不同的工艺参数在低碳钢上沉积镍钛涂层。

对 NiTi 涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、微观结构、相变和功能热机械性能进行了评估。尽管涂层含有不均匀的微观结构、空隙、氧化物颗粒、高密度的位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械加载时会发生马氏体转变。由于喷涂镍钛涂层需要进行退火才能显示出功能性热机械性能。尽管拉伸强度有限，但涂层在三点弯曲测试中表现出热驱动作用，在纳米压痕和划痕测试中表现出形状记忆效应。

title: Sandpile Models on complex networks
abstract: We investigate the sandpile model on complex networks by developing a branching-process framework that explicitly incorporates dissipation during avalanche propagation. Unlike classical branching descriptions, which assume conservative transport and locally tree-like independence, the present approach introduces grain-loss effects directly into the offspring distribution, yielding generalized generating functions for dissipative avalanche dynamics. In the dissipative regime, avalanche-size distributions acquire exponential cutoffs while preserving topology-dependent scaling behavior. Numerical simulations confirm the theoretical predictions on sparse random networks and reveal systematic deviations in highly structured topologies. In particular, by using Holme-Kim clustered scale-free networks, we show that increasing clustering continuously lowers the avalanche exponent and enhances the probability of large cascades, demonstrating that short cycles generate strong correlations that invalidate the classical independent-branch approx imation. Surprisingly, trees also exhibit substantial deviations from power-law because low edge density and the abundance of leaves constrain avalanche propagation. These results show that dissipation, clustering, and sparse connectivity fundamentally reshape avalanche size distribution of the sandpile model on networks and establish quantitative limits for branching-process descriptions of avalanche dynamics.
summary:
我们通过开发一个明确包含雪崩传播期间耗散的分支过程框架来研究复杂网络上的沙堆模型。与假设保守传输和局部树状独立性的经典分支描述不同，本方法将颗粒损失效应直接引入到后代分布中，产生耗散雪崩动力学的广义生成函数。在耗散状态下，雪崩尺寸分布获得指数截止，同时保留依赖于拓扑的缩放行为。数值模拟证实了稀疏随机网络的理论预测，并揭示了高度结构化拓扑中的系统偏差。特别是，通过使用 Holme-Kim 聚类无标度网络，我们表明增加聚类不断降低雪崩指数并提高大级联的概率，证明短周期产生强相关性，从而使经典的独立分支近似无效。

令人惊讶的是，树木也表现出与幂律的显着偏差，因为低边缘密度和丰富的叶子限制了雪崩传播。这些结果表明，耗散、聚类和稀疏连接从根本上重塑了网络上沙堆模型的雪崩尺寸分布，并为雪崩动力学的分支过程描述建立了定量限制。

title: Quantum-geometric shift of quasiequilibrium: Origin of nonreciprocal current driven by quantum-metric dipole
abstract: We study nonlinear DC electric transport of quantum-metric origin by combining adiabatic perturbation theory with the nonequilibrium Green function approach. The adiabatic ansatz provides a basis for directly treating a DC electric field in the velocity gauge, rather than introducing it as the zero-frequency limit of an AC field. The resulting adiabatic-basis Hamiltonian takes the same form as in the length gauge, enabling a systematic comparison across different formulations. Applying this fully quantum formulation, we find a longitudinal nonreciprocal current governed by the quantum-metric dipole. The essential ingredient is a quantum correction to the distribution function that is absent in semiclassical treatments. We trace this correction to the finite spread of an electron wave packet during relaxation under a bias field, thereby identifying shifted quasiequilibrium as the physical origin of quantum-metric nonreciprocal transport.
summary: 我们通过将绝热微扰理论与非平衡格林函数方法相结合来研究量子度量起源的非线性直流电输运。绝热拟定为直接处理速度计中的直流电场提供了基础，而不是将其作为交流场的零频率极限引入。由此产生的绝热基哈密顿量采用与长度计相同的形式，从而能够对不同公式进行系统比较。应用这个完全量子公式，我们发现了由量子偶极子控制的纵向不可逆电流。其基本要素是对分布函数的量子修正，而这在半经典处理中是不存在的。我们将这种校正追溯到偏置场下弛豫期间电子波包的有限扩展，从而将移动的准平衡确定为量子计量非互易输运的物理起源。

title: A 2048-spin bulk acoustic wave Ising machine for number partitioning and Sudoku
abstract: Optical coherent Ising machines based on time-multiplexing have demonstrated significant progress in terms of connectivity and spin scalability. However, they are constrained by large physical footprints, high power consumption, poor thermal stability, and high cost. Here, we present a time-multiplexed Ising machine leveraging propagating wave packets in solid-state delay lines at microwave frequencies, enabling thermally stable, robust, low-power, tabletop, and affordable design. We use two serially connected 20.5 MHz, 707 {\mu}s bulk acoustic wave delay lines supporting 2,048 spins. Our design provides all-to-all connectivity with 15-bit coupling resolution and finds approximate MAX-CUT solutions in 341 ms, potentially scalable to sub-ms by using higher frequency delay lines. Additionally, we demonstrate solutions to number partitioning and Sudoku problems. Compared with state-of-the-art Coherent Ising machines, our machine exhibits four orders of magnitude higher thermal stability. Against the simulated bifurcation algorithm, our design achieves comparable results on the MAX-CUT problem, while outperforming it on the more complex number-partitioning and Sudoku problems.
summary: 基于时分复用的光学相干伊辛机在连接性和自旋可扩展性方面表现出了显着的进步。然而，它们受到物理占地面积大、功耗高、热稳定性差和成本高的限制。在这里，我们提出了一种时分复用 Ising 机器，利用微波频率下固态延迟线中的传播波包，实现热稳定、稳健、低功耗、桌面且经济实惠的设计。我们使用两个串联的 20.5 MHz、707 {\mu}s 体声波延迟线，支持 2,048 个旋转。我们的设计提供具有 15 位耦合分辨率的全对全连接，并在 341 毫秒内找到近似的 MAX-CUT 解决方案，通过使用更高频率的延迟线，有可能扩展到亚毫秒级。此外，我们还演示了数字分区和数独问题的解决方案。与最先进的 Coherent Ising 机器相比，我们的机器的热稳定性高出四个数量级。与模拟分叉算法相比，我们的设计在 MAX-CUT 问题上取得了可比的结果，同时在更复杂的数字划分和数独问题上表现优于它。

title: Phonon spectral function of Holstein polaron: Investigation of many-body effects with self-energy and vertex correction
abstract: We study the impact of the many-body effects on the phonon spectral function of Holstein polaron in one-dimension in the antiadiabatic regime by incorporating the contributions from the electron self-energy and vertex corrections within a weak-coupling approach that respects the charge-conserving Ward identity. We find that while the polaronic spectral weight is suppressed due to contribution from the electron self-energy, on the other hand, the same is enhanced due to contribution from the vertex corrections. While strength of both the contributions increases with increasing the wave vector ($\q$) of phonons, they nearly cancel each other for the small-$\q$ modes so that the polaronic spectral weight is weakly affected due to the many-body effects. For the large-$\q$ modes near the zone boundary, the net many-body correction is dominated by the contribution of the electron self-energy which increases faster in comparison to that of the vertex corrections with increasing the wave vector thereby resulting in a significant suppression of the polaronic spectral weight. We find that while the weak-coupling perturbative approach provides a reliable estimation of the impact of the many-body effects deep inside the antiadibatic regime, the renormalization of quasiparticle spectrum must be taken into account for an accurate estimation when the phonon energy approaches the electronic bandwidth.
summary:
我们通过将电子自能和顶点校正的贡献纳入尊重电荷守恒沃德恒等式的弱耦合方法中，研究多体效应对抗绝热体系中一维荷斯坦极化子声子谱函数的影响。我们发现，虽然极化子谱权重由于电子自能的贡献而受到抑制，但另一方面，由于顶点校正的贡献，极化谱权重却得到了增强。虽然这两种贡献的强度随着声子波矢 ($\q$) 的增加而增加，但对于小 $\q$ 模式，它们几乎相互抵消，因此极化谱权重由于多体效应而受到的影响很弱。对于区域边界附近的大$\q$模式，净多体校正主要由电子自能的贡献决定，与顶点校正相比，随着波矢量的增加，电子自能的增加速度更快，从而导致极化谱权重的显着抑制。

我们发现，虽然弱耦合微扰方法可以可靠地估计反绝热区域深处多体效应的影响，但当声子能量接近电子带宽时，必须考虑准粒子谱的重正化才能进行准确估计。

title: Path-Measure Dynamics of Attention-Driven World Models: A Nonlocal Onsager--Machlup Approach
abstract: Attention enables a world model to condition on its entire history, providing long-term memory that facilitates long-range predictions. While the local Onsager--Machlup theory in our companion paper assumes a temporally local predictive action, we investigate the conditions under which this locality holds. We derive the predictive path measure for latent dynamics that become non-Markovian due to attention-induced memory, demonstrating that this measure is the projection of a hidden linear Markov augmentation. Eliminating the auxiliary field results in a nonlocal Onsager--Machlup action, where memory manifests as a nonlocal quadratic form rather than a force. These kernels are completely monotone and exactly match a hidden Markov embedding with a finite relaxation spectrum; otherwise, the dynamics remain fundamentally nonlocal. By expanding the action in terms of the scale-separation parameter $\epsilon=\tau_{\text{mem}}/\tau_{\text{dyn}}$, we show that the leading order recovers the local action of the companion paper, establishing locality as the short-memory limit of a nonlocal theory. We verify the reversible sector of this expansion term by term against an exactly solvable vector linear model.
summary:
注意力使世界模型能够以其整个历史为条件，提供有助于长期预测的长期记忆。虽然我们的配套论文中的局部 Onsager-Machlup 理论假设了时间上的局部预测作用，但我们研究了该局部性成立的条件。我们推导了由于注意力诱导记忆而变成非马尔可夫的潜在动态的预测路径测量，证明该测量是隐藏线性马尔可夫增强的投影。消除辅助场会导致非局部 Onsager-Machlup 作用，其中记忆表现为非局部二次形式而不是力。这些内核是完全单调的，并且与具有有限松弛谱的隐马尔可夫嵌入完全匹配；否则，动态从根本上来说仍然是非局域的。通过根据尺度分离参数 $\epsilon=\tau_{\text{mem}}/\tau_{\text{dyn}}$ 扩展作用，我们表明前序恢复了配套论文的局部作用，将局部性建立为非局部理论的短记忆极限。

我们针对精确可解的向量线性模型逐项验证了该展开式的可逆扇区。

title: Theory of collective learning in populations of adaptive agents
abstract: We investigate homogeneous populations of smart active agents that exchange information with their neighbors to perform a decentralized learning process aimed at achieving a prescribed macroscopic state. Such agents may, for example, represent simple microrobots. The exchanged information comprises tunable parameters governing the agent dynamics, referred to as the individual policy, together with an internal memory encoding previously visited states. This memory is used to evaluate a reward that quantifies the success of a policy to achieve the prescribed state. We extend the kinetic-theory description of collective learning in spatially homogeneous systems [Phys. Rev. Lett. 134, 248302 (2025)] and derive formal evolution equations for the distribution of policies across the population. A central outcome of our theory is the emergence of an effective reward function that fully determines the evolution of the policy distribution and encapsulates the microscopic details of the agents physical and memory dynamics. We obtain closed equations for the policy mean and variance which admit explicit time-dependent solutions under the assumption of Gaussian-distributed memories and polices. To illustrate the framework, we present a series of minimal microscopic models, considering both perfect and partial separation of physical, memory and policy exchange time scales, as well as models with one- and two-dimensional policies. The obtained theoretical results compare well with agent-based numerical simulations. The theory captures key aspects of collective learning, including the influence of population diversity and reward fluctuations on learning performance. Finally, we discuss potential applications to swarm robotics and machine learning, and highlight connections with classical models of biological evolution, including the Replicator equation and the Moran model.
summary:
我们研究智能主动体的同质群体，这些智能体与邻居交换信息以执行分散的学习过程，旨在实现规定的宏观状态。例如，此类代理可以代表简单的微型机器人。交换的信息包括管理代理动态的可调参数（称为个体策略）以及编码先前访问的状态的内部存储器。该内存用于评估奖励，该奖励量化策略是否成功实现规定状态。我们扩展了空间同质系统中集体学习的动力学理论描述[Phys。莱特牧师。 134, 248302 (2025)] 并推导出政策在人口中分布的正式演化方程。我们理论的一个核心成果是有效奖励函数的出现，它完全决定了策略分布的演变，并封装了代理物理和记忆动态的微观细节。我们获得了策略均值和方差的闭合方程，该方程在高斯分布记忆和策略的假设下允许显式的时间相关解。

为了说明该框架，我们提出了一系列最小微观模型，考虑了物理、内存和策略交换时间尺度的完美和部分分离，以及具有一维和二维策略的模型。获得的理论结果与基于代理的数值模拟非常吻合。该理论抓住了集体学习的关键方面，包括人口多样性和奖励波动对学习绩效的影响。最后，我们讨论了群体机器人和机器学习的潜在应用，并强调了与生物进化经典模型的联系，包括复制方程和莫兰模型。

title: A density matrix renormalization group approach to quantum point contacts
abstract: Using the density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) combined with the correction-vector method, we investigate the competition between an harmonic potential and repulsive interactions in a one-dimensional fermionic system. The parabolic confinement induces spatial inhomogeneity, and by tuning its curvature one can continuously interpolate between a potential well--relevant for cold-atom setups--and a quantum barrier, as realized in mesoscopic systems such as quantum point contacts. We analyze how the ground-state particle distribution evolves with the strength and sign of the confining potential and how the confinement reshapes the spectral weight of the local density of states (LDOS) at the center of the chain. In the barrier regime, a localized peak emerges in the electron part of the spectrum ($\omega >0$) as a direct consequence of the potential. In contrast, in the well configuration and for weak interactions, a localized feature persists but shifts to the hole sector ($\omega <0$). However, for stronger interactions, the LDOS no longer displays clear signatures of the external potential, indicating that correlations dominate over single-particle confinement.
summary: 使用密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）与校正向量方法相结合，我们研究了一维费米子系统中谐波势和排斥相互作用之间的竞争。抛物线限制会引起空间不均匀性，通过调整其曲率，人们可以在与冷原子设置相关的势阱和量子势垒之间连续插值，如在量子点接触等介观系统中实现的那样。我们分析了基态粒子分布如何随着限制势的强度和符号而演变，以及限制如何重塑链中心局部态密度（LDOS）的谱权重。在势垒区，作为电势的直接结果，局部峰值出现在光谱的电子部分（$\omega >0$）。相反，在井配置和弱相互作用中，局部特征仍然存在，但转移到孔扇区（$\omega <0$）。然而，对于更强的相互作用，LDOS 不再显示出外部电势的清晰特征，这表明相关性优于单粒子限制。

title: Exact amplitude relations for diffusion-limited aggregation
abstract: It has been known for several decades that the third moment of the multifractal spectrum of the harmonic measure for diffusion-limited aggregates is linked to the underlying fractal dimension of the cluster. We demonstrate, using an argument based on the Hastings-Levitov formulation of diffusion-limited aggregation (DLA) in two dimensions, an even stronger link, connecting the universal amplitude of the third moment to the cluster fractal dimension. This argument can be used for both the standard circular DLA as well as DLA in a cylinder (i.e., with periodic boundary conditions).
summary: 几十年来，人们已经知道，扩散限制聚集体的调和测度的多重分形谱的三阶矩与团簇的基础分形维数有关。我们使用基于二维扩散限制聚合 (DLA) 的黑斯廷斯-列维托夫公式的论证，证明了一个更强的联系，将第三矩的通用振幅与簇分形维数连接起来。该参数可用于标准圆形 DLA 以及圆柱体中的 DLA（即具有周期性边界条件）。

title: Differentiable inverse design of short-range order in high-entropy alloys: from target sro to target property
abstract: Short-range order (SRO) governs the mechanical response of multi-principal-element alloys, but designing an alloy for a target property usually means solving two disconnected problems: building a structure matching a desired SRO pattern, then separately checking its property, with no shared optimization. This work replaces the standard random-swap search (reverse Monte Carlo) with a gradient-based approach: atom occupancy is treated as continuous rather than fixed, so the whole process can be tuned using gradient descent, the same method used to train neural networks. This builder matches random-swap accuracy on small systems, but is six times faster and eight times more accurate on large 4000-atom systems, and scales smoothly to alloys with many elements without extra bookkeeping. A physics-based correction term, adapted from prior two-element work and extended here to many elements, keeps designed structures thermodynamically realistic rather than just numerically matching the target SRO pattern. A small neural network then predicts mechanical properties directly from composition and SRO statistics, closing the loop from target property back to structure. Tested on nine face-centered-cubic and body-centered-cubic alloys, the pipeline captured SRO-driven stiffness changes from -20% to +57%, and cell-size checks showed at least 864 atoms are needed to get the direction and size of these changes right, since the commonly used 108-atom cells can mislead. Against real simulations for a cobalt-chromium-nickel alloy, the method matched three of four target stiffness values within 6%. The method is released as an open-source Python package, anisro, offering a practical route to gradient-based, property-driven alloy design.
summary:
短程有序 (SRO) 控制多主要元素合金的机械响应，但针对目标性能设计合金通常意味着解决两个互不相关的问题：构建与所需 SRO 模式匹配的结构，然后单独检查其性能，而不进行共享优化。这项工作用基于梯度的方法取代了标准的随机交换搜索（反向蒙特卡罗）：原子占用被视为连续而不是固定，因此可以使用梯度下降来调整整个过程，这与训练神经网络的方法相同。该构建器在小型系统上与随机交换精度相匹配，但在大型 4000 个原子系统上速度提高了六倍，精度提高了八倍，并且可以平滑地扩展到具有许多元素的合金，而无需额外的簿记。基于物理的修正项改编自之前的二元工作，并在此处扩展到许多元素，使设计的结构保持热力学真实性，而不仅仅是在数字上匹配目标 SRO 模式。然后，小型神经网络直接根据成分和 SRO 统计数据预测机械性能，从而形成从目标性能到结构的闭环。

该管道在九种面心立方和体心立方合金上进行了测试，捕获了 SRO 驱动的刚度从 -20% 到 +57% 的变化，并且单元尺寸检查显示至少需要 864 个原子才能获得这些变化的方向和尺寸，因为常用的 108 个原子单元可能会产生误导。与钴铬镍合金的实际模拟相比，该方法将四个目标刚度值中的三个匹配在 6% 以内。该方法作为开源 Python 包 anisro 发布，为基于梯度、属性驱动的合金设计提供了实用途径。

title: Alternative routes to universal diversity scaling in component systems: from proteomes to large language models
abstract: Remarkably common statistical laws characterize the diversity scaling and its fluctuations across a wide range of complex "component systems". These regularities are often interpreted as signatures of an underlying innovation mechanism driving the growth of component diversity, but the basic ingredients necessary for their emergence remain poorly understood. In particular, from language and technological artifacts to genomes and gene expression patterns, the number of distinct components grows sublinearly with system size, while its variance scales approximately as the square of its mean. This behavior is consistent across diverse systems, raising the question of whether general constraints or emergent principles underlying diversity and innovation define the architectures of realizations with different numbers of components. To address this question, we derive analytical conditions for the joint emergence of these two diversity laws within a broad class of growth models, showing that they require a specific asymptotic dependence of the innovation probability on diversity and system size. We then demonstrate that the same macroscopic laws arise in a different class of models with latent heterogeneity, where quadratic fluctuation scaling always emerges asymptotically as a consequence of general statistical principles, essentially the law of total variance, without explicitly assuming an innovation mechanism or any specific rule for system assembly. We compare these predictions with empirical data from language, genomes, LEGO constructions, and texts generated by large language models. Our results show that empirical diversity scaling laws strongly constrain generative models but do not uniquely identify the mechanisms generating diversity, revealing a close correspondence between innovation-driven growth models and latent-variable descriptions.
summary:
非常常见的统计定律描述了各种复杂“组件系统”的多样性缩放及其波动。这些规律通常被解释为推动组件多样性增长的潜在创新机制的标志，但其出现所需的基本要素仍然知之甚少。特别是，从语言和技术制品到基因组和基因表达模式，不同组件的数量随着系统规模呈次线性增长，而其方差大约与其均值的平方成正比。这种行为在不同的系统中是一致的，这就提出了一个问题：多样性和创新背后的一般约束或新兴原则是否定义了具有不同数量组件的实现架构。为了解决这个问题，我们得出了在广泛的增长模型中联合出现这两个多样性定律的分析条件，表明它们需要创新概率对多样性和系统规模的特定渐近依赖性。

然后，我们证明相同的宏观规律出现在具有潜在异质性的不同类别的模型中，其中二次涨落标度总是作为一般统计原理（本质上是总方差定律）的结果渐近出现，而无需明确假设创新机制或系统组装的任何特定规则。我们将这些预测与来自语言、基因组、乐高结构以及大型语言模型生成的文本的经验数据进行比较。我们的结果表明，经验多样性尺度法则强烈限制生成模型，但不能唯一地识别生成多样性的机制，揭示了创新驱动的增长模型和潜在变量描述之间的密切对应关系。

title: Efficient Large-Scale STEM-EELS Simulations With Torched-TACAW
abstract: The time auto-correlation of auxiliary wave functions (TACAW) method enables efficient simulations of ultra-low-loss electron energy loss spectra (EELS) arising from vibrational and magnon excitations. In practical applications to realistic materials systems, however, TACAW calculations become challenging due to the large system sizes required for models containing defects, interfaces, impurities, or grain boundaries, as well as the substantial computational cost and data throughput associated with molecular dynamics and multislice calculations. Here we discuss a practical methodology for large-scale TACAW simulations and present torched-TACAW, a freely available implementation of the TACAW part of the described workflow for efficient STEM-EELS simulations. The overall approach combines molecular dynamics based on foundational machine-learned interatomic potentials, partitioning of elongated supercells, and on-the-fly processing of multislice outputs in order to enable near ab initio quality simulations with tractable memory use and data flow. Using rutile TiO2 as a model system, we analyze important numerical aspects of the method, including windowing and supercell partitioning, and demonstrate atomic-resolution STEM-EELS simulations for thick samples.
summary:
辅助波函数时间自相关 (TACAW) 方法能够有效模拟由振动和磁振子激发产生的超低损耗电子能量损失谱 (EELS)。然而，在实际材料系统的实际应用中，由于包含缺陷、界面、杂质或晶界的模型所需的大系统尺寸，以及与分子动力学和多层计算相关的大量计算成本和数据吞吐量，TACAW 计算变得具有挑战性。在这里，我们讨论了大规模 TACAW 模拟的实用方法，并提出了 torched-TACAW，这是所描述工作流程中 TACAW 部分的免费实现，用于高效的 STEM-EELS 模拟。整体方法结合了基于基础机器学习原子间势的分子动力学、细长超晶胞的划分以及多层输出的动态处理，以便通过易于处理的内存使用和数据流实现近乎从头开始的质量模拟。

使用金红石 TiO2 作为模型系统，我们分析了该方法的重要数值方面，包括加窗和超晶胞分配，并演示了厚样品的原子分辨率 STEM-EELS 模拟。

title: Interfacial Strain and Structural Defects Govern the Performance of Tantalum Superconducting Waveguide Resonators
abstract: Tantalum (Ta) is a promising material for reaching long coherence times in superconducting qubits. A detailed understanding of the underlying structure-property relationship remains elusive though. In the present study, we sputter-deposited 200 nm thick Ta films on high-resistivity silicon (100) substrates at temperatures ranging from T = 20°C to 600°C, as well as on different seed layers (Nb, TiN and TaN). Alpha-Ta thin films were readily obtained at temperatures above 500°C and on all seed layers. The films were characterized in terms of surface morphology, residual-resistance ratio, crystal phase composition and superconducting transition temperature, as well as RF-performance using coplanar waveguide resonators. Internal quality factors of up to 1.5 million were measured at 100 mK in the single-photon regime. Despite similar bulk material properties, alpha-Ta films on different seed layers exhibit markedly different RF-performance, which we attribute to dissimilar strain and structural defects at the substrate-metal interfaces. Williamson-Hall analysis of XRD data reveals a clear correlation between decreasing microstrain and increasing quality factor. Cross-sectional HR-TEM further supports this interpretation by directly resolving interfacial disorder. Our results highlight the critical role of interface engineering in optimizing superconducting thin films for low-loss quantum computing circuitry.
summary:
钽 (Ta) 是一种很有前景的材料，可以在超导量子位中实现较长的相干时间。然而，对底层结构-性能关系的详细理解仍然难以捉摸。在本研究中，我们在 T = 20°C 至 600°C 的温度范围内，在高电阻率硅 (100) 基板上以及不同的种子层（Nb、TiN 和 TaN）上溅射沉积 200 nm 厚的 Ta 薄膜。在高于 500°C 的温度下，所有种子层上都可以轻松获得 Alpha-Ta 薄膜。使用共面波导谐振器对薄膜的表面形貌、残余电阻比、晶相组成和超导转变温度以及射频性能进行了表征。在单光子状态下，在 100 mK 下测量到的内部质量因子高达 150 万。尽管块体材料特性相似，但不同籽晶层上的 α-Ta 薄膜表现出明显不同的射频性能，我们将其归因于基底-金属界面处不同的应变和结构缺陷。 XRD 数据的 Williamson-Hall 分析揭示了微应变降低与品质因数增加之间存在明显的相关性。

横截面 HR-TEM 通过直接解决界面紊乱进一步支持了这种解释。我们的结果凸显了界面工程在优化超导薄膜以实现低损耗量子计算电路方面的关键作用。

title: Josephson and Spin Currents in Coupled Polariton Condensates
abstract: We analyze particle and spin currents in networks of coupled spinor exciton-polariton condensates arranged as plaquettes and regular polygonal rings. In closed geometries, spin-conserving and TE-TM-induced spin-flip tunnelling combine to generate circulating particle currents, hidden spin counterflows, and bond-dependent spin-current patterns. For the minimal geometries - an equilateral triangle, and a square plaquette - we derive analytical expressions for edge-resolved currents from stationary configurations obtained by energy minimization. We then show how particle, in-plane spin, and out-of-plane spin currents partition the parameter plane and provide direct signatures of the equilibrium phases. Finally, we apply the same current-resolved diagnostics to larger rings, where winding numbers and a branch-invariant common-phase coherence metric organize the resulting phase structure.
summary: 我们分析了排列为小板和规则多边形环的耦合旋量激子-极化子凝聚物网络中的粒子和自旋流。在封闭几何结构中，自旋守恒和 TE-TM 诱导的自旋翻转隧道相结合，产生循环粒子流、隐藏的自旋逆流和键相关的自旋流模式。对于最小几何形状 - 等边三角形和正方形斑块 - 我们从通过能量最小化获得的稳态配置推导出边缘分辨电流的解析表达式。然后，我们展示粒子、面内自旋和面外自旋电流如何划分参数平面并提供平衡相的直接特征。最后，我们将相同的电流解析诊断应用于更大的环，其中绕组数和分支不变的共相相干度量组织了所得的相位结构。

title: Disorder-induced superconductivity in graphene
abstract: Correlated phases of matter are typically investigated in crystalline systems, where disorder is considered to be detrimental. However, intriguing exceptions exist, such as superconductivity being enhanced in amorphous realizations of Al and Bi. Here, we demonstrate that superconductivity can even emerge entirely from disorder, using monolayer graphene as an example. In the clean limit, the semi-metallic nature of graphene requires prohibitively strong electronic interactions to achieve superconductivity. Despite the inherently random nature of disorder, we show that introducing low concentrations of vacancies or hydrogenation in graphene provides a large density of low-energy states that easily induce superconductivity. For conventional $s$-wave pairing, disorder induces a finite superconducting order parameter for arbitrarily weak attractive interactions. Rather than forming isolated superconducting puddles, global phase coherence is established through a finite superfluid weight of purely geometrical origin. Away from the chiral limit of vacancies, hydrogenation similarly yields a finite transition temperature and nonzero superfluid weight for weak interactions. For unconventional nearest-neighbor pairing, typically more disrupted by disorder, superconductivity exhibits quantum-critical-like behavior, yet phase coherence persists at low interaction strengths, with mixed $d$-wave symmetries. Our work demonstrates the robust emergence of macroscopic superconducting phase coherence engineered entirely from microscopic disorder.
summary:
通常在晶体系统中研究物质的相关相，其中无序被认为是有害的。然而，也存在一些有趣的例外，例如铝和铋的非晶态实现中超导性得到增强。在这里，我们以单层石墨烯为例，证明超导甚至可以完全从无序中产生。在清洁极限下，石墨烯的半金属性质需要极强的电子相互作用才能实现超导性。尽管无序本质上是随机的，但我们表明，在石墨烯中引入低浓度的空位或氢化可提供高密度的低能态，很容易诱发超导性。对于传统的 $s$ 波配对，无序会导致任意弱的吸引相互作用的有限超导序参数。全局相位相干性不是形成孤立的超导水坑，而是通过纯几何起源的有限超流体重量来建立。远离空位的手性极限，氢化同样会产生有限的转变温度和弱相互作用的非零超流体权重。

对于非常规的最近邻配对，通常更容易受到无序的破坏，超导性表现出类似量子临界的行为，但相位相干性在低相互作用强度下仍然存在，具有混合 $d$ 波对称性。我们的工作证明了完全由微观无序设计的宏观超导相位相干性的强劲出现。

title: How wrong is too wrong: A numerical study on the relevance of positional memory in the generalized Langevin equation
abstract: If a generalized Langevin equation contains a potential of mean force, it cannot at the same time contain a linear memory kernel and a fluctuating force that obeys a second fluctuation dissipation theorem in the sense of Kubo, and be exact. As modelers often prefer to use generalized Langevin equations that have the first three properties, one needs to ask how close the model dynamics is to the dynamics of the underlying microscopic system. To test this, we analyze a simple model system in which the potential of mean force can be well approximated by a polynomial of low order. The exact generalized Langevin equation of this model contains memory terms in addition to the linear one. We show that these additional terms, at least for the model system regarded in this article, are important for the dynamics and cannot be neglected if one intends to model core aspects of the underlying system correctly.
summary: 如果广义朗之万方程包含平均力势，则它不能同时包含线性记忆核和服从 Kubo 意义上的第二波动耗散定理的波动力，并且是精确的。由于建模者通常更喜欢使用具有前三个属性的广义朗之万方程，因此需要询问模型动力学与底层微观系统动力学的接近程度。为了测试这一点，我们分析了一个简单的模型系统，其中平均力的潜力可以通过低阶多项式很好地近似。该模型的精确广义朗之万方程除线性项外还包含记忆项。我们表明，至少对于本文中考虑的模型系统来说，这些附加项对于动力学非常重要，如果想要正确地对底层系统的核心方面进行建模，就不能忽视这些附加项。

title: Velocity and force autocorrelations in Brownian dynamics with a Lorentz force
abstract: We derive a general relation between the velocity and force autocorrelation tensors (VACT and FACT) for a Brownian particle subject to an external magnetic field. Using time-symmetry arguments, we show that, for the full Langevin dynamics, the VACT depends only on the FACT, independently of the details of the interaction potential. Under the hypothesis of timescale separation between thermalization and interaction-driven motion, this relation simplifies considerably in the overdamped (Brownian) limit. A central feature of the overdamped result is that, unlike in the field-free case, the part of the VACT that controls the self-diffusion of the particle couples to the antisymmetric part of the FACT, with a coupling strength set by the ratio of the cyclotron frequency to the thermalization rate. We validate and illustrate the formalism on an exactly solvable model: a dimer of charged particles bound by a harmonic potential. Depending on the relative sign of the particle charges, the magnetic field is found to produce either a transient suppression of mobility and diffusion that is fully recovered at long times, or a persistent oscillatory force autocorrelation, regions of negative mobility, and a long-time suppression of self-diffusion.
summary:
我们推导了受外部磁场影响的布朗粒子的速度和力自相关张量（VACT 和 FACT）之间的一般关系。使用时间对称性论证，我们表明，对于完整的 Langevin 动力学，VACT 仅取决于 FACT，与相互作用势的细节无关。在热化和相互作用驱动运动之间的时间尺度分离的假设下，这种关系在过阻尼（布朗）极限下大大简化。过阻尼结果的一个中心特征是，与无场情况不同，控制粒子自扩散的 VACT 部分耦合到 FACT 的反对称部分，耦合强度由回旋加速器频率与热化速率的比率设定。我们验证并说明了一个完全可解模型的形式：由谐波势束缚的带电粒子二聚体。

根据粒子电荷的相对符号，磁场被发现会产生对迁移率和扩散的瞬态抑制，并在长时间内完全恢复，或者产生持续振荡力自相关、负迁移率区域和对自扩散的长期抑制。

title: Fundamental limitations of single-particle Green's-function zeroes as probes of many-body topology
abstract: We show that topological invariants constructed from single-particle Green's functions (GFs) cannot reliably diagnose the topology of interacting many-body states. Using coupled interacting SSH chains as a minimal example, we demonstrate that a spin-spin interaction can trivialize the many-body ground state without affecting the GF topological invariant. This breakdown originates from the GF's inability to probe electronic excitations in the Fock sectors responsible for the topological degeneracy. Consequently, GF zeroes are not associated with physical topological quasiparticles and cannot generally characterize interacting topological phases.
summary: 我们表明，由单粒子格林函数（GF）构建的拓扑不变量无法可靠地诊断相互作用的多体状态的拓扑。使用耦合相互作用的 SSH 链作为最小示例，我们证明自旋-自旋相互作用可以使多体基态变得微不足道，而不影响 GF 拓扑不变量。这种故障源于 GF 无法探测负责拓扑简并的福克扇区中的电子激发。因此，GF 零点与物理拓扑准粒子无关，并且不能普遍表征相互作用的拓扑相。

title: Contrarian Majority Dynamics: Violation of Detailed Balance and Nonequilibrium Steady States
abstract: I revisit the Galam Majority Model (GMM) with contrarian agents from a statistical-mechanics perspective, revealing three fundamental features. First, in addition to the GMM simultaneous-update of small discussion groups, I construct a related single-agent stochastic dynamics, providing a Markovian microscopic representation, which is found to yield the same evolution equation. Second, I show that, contrary to what is often stated in the literature, the GMM closed evolution equation for the opinion density is not the result of a mean-field approximation. Indeed, I derive the conventional mean-field dynamics associated with majority-rule interactions and show that it yields a distinct, probabilistic evolution equation contrary the deterministic GMM equation. I therefore identify the GMM as an iterated mean-field dynamics. Third, I investigate the thermodynamic nature of the dynamics obtained from both single-agent and simultaneous updates. Both are shown to violate detailed balance. However, while Kolmogorov's cycle condition is satisfied for single-agent updates, it is violated for simultaneous updates, making the departure from equilibrium stronger in the latter case. I then compute the probability flux in the stationary state and show that it is non-vanishing, confirming the absence of an effective Hamiltonian and establishing that the stationary state is a genuine nonequilibrium steady this http URL results clarify the statistical-mechanical foundations of the GMM and establish contrarian majority dynamics as an intrinsically non-equilibrium process with distinct regimes of irreversibility. Contrarians are not thermal noise.
summary:
我从统计力学的角度重新审视了逆势代理人的加拉姆多数模型（GMM），揭示了三个基本特征。首先，除了小讨论组的 GMM 同时更新之外，我还构建了一个相关的单智能体随机动力学，提供了马尔可夫微观表示，发现它产生了相同的进化方程。其次，我证明，与文献中经常提到的相反，意见密度的 GMM 闭合演化方程并不是平均场近似的结果。事实上，我推导了与多数规则相互作用相关的传统平均场动力学，并表明它产生了一个与确定性 GMM 方程相反的独特的概率演化方程。因此，我将 GMM 视为迭代平均场动力学。第三，我研究了从单代理和同步更新中获得的动力学的热力学性质。两者都被证明违反了细节平衡。然而，虽然柯尔莫哥洛夫的循环条件对于单智能体更新是满足的，但对于同时更新则违反了该条件，使得在后一种情况下更加偏离平衡。

然后，我计算静止状态下的概率通量，并表明它是非消失的，确认了有效哈密顿量的存在，并确定静止状态是真正的非平衡稳定。此 http URL 结果阐明了 GMM 的统计力学基础，并将逆向多数动力学建立为具有不同不可逆机制的本质上非平衡过程。逆向投资者并不是热噪音。

title: Correlation and entanglement dynamics of free fermions in disguise
abstract: We study the nonequilibrium dynamics following a quantum quench in spin chains that can be solved via a mapping to free fermions in disguise. These models feature an exponential degeneracy of all energy eigenvalues, raising the question of the validity of the established framework describing the properties of integrable systems out of equilibrium. We present two main results. First, we develop an analytic method to compute the quasi-momentum distribution function characterizing the generalized Gibbs ensemble, and derive an analytic formula to compute the corresponding expectation values for special observables. Second, we conjecture a modification of the standard formula for the entanglement growth based on the quasi-particle picture, taking into account that each fermion in disguise carries an additional amount of entropy due to the exponential degeneracy of the energy eigenvalues. We test our theoretical predictions against numerical tensor-network computations for different initial states and Hamiltonian parameters. For the local observables, we find excellent agreement. For the entanglement dynamics, we find small deviations suggesting that our conjecture is only approximately correct. Our results represent a first step towards the extension of the established framework of integrable systems out of equilibrium to models hosting free fermions in disguise.
summary:
我们研究自旋链中量子淬灭后的非平衡动力学，可以通过变相映射到自由费米子来解决。这些模型的特点是所有能量特征值呈指数简并，提出了描述失衡可积系统特性的已建立框架的有效性问题。我们提出两个主要结果。首先，我们开发了一种解析方法来计算表征广义吉布斯系综的准动量分布函数，并推导了一个解析公式来计算特殊可观测量的相应期望值。其次，考虑到由于能量本征值的指数简并性，每个变相的费米子都携带额外的熵，我们推测基于准粒子图对纠缠增长的标准公式进行了修改。我们针对不同初始状态和哈密顿参数的数值张量网络计算来测试我们的理论预测。对于当地的观测值，我们发现非常一致。

对于纠缠动力学，我们发现小的偏差表明我们的猜想只是大致正确。我们的结果代表了将已建立的不平衡可积系统框架扩展为伪装的自由费米子模型的第一步。

title: Bottlenecks in Hamiltonian-Adaptive Resolution Simulation Method for Modeling Interfaces
abstract: The Hamiltonian-Adaptive Resolution Simulation (H-AdResS) method allows to combine atomistic and particle-based coarse-grained models in a single simulation box, which makes it very attractive to model systems containing interfaces or reactive regions surrounded by an interacting environment. In our previous work [ arXiv:2604.21867 ], we implemented H-AdResS in LAMMPS 2023 and extended its use to interfaces, focusing on MOF/CO$_2$ interfaces as an example. We found that, despite its advantages, using this method properly for this kind of systems is not trivial. In this work, an in-depth analysis of the impact of the choice of thermostatting schemes and long-range electrostatics models is presented. Even though its Hamiltonian formulation enables performing H-AdResS simulations within constant temperatures ensembles, not every thermostat is appropriate. We demonstrate that Langevin thermostat is a reliable choice for this method, while Nosé-Hoover results in artifacts. In addition, we show that using short-range models such as the Damped Shifted Force method for electrostatics, a popular choice for H-AdResS simulations, can lead to non-physical results when modeling interfaces. The need of capping strategies to deal with discontinuities in forces and energies arising from abrupt changes in resolution is also discussed. Finally, the impossibility of changing the definition of the H-AdResS Hamiltonian to include a gradual interpolation of the bonded degrees of freedom is discussed. We hope that this contribution helps the reader to appropriately set up H-AdResS simulations and to assess if this method can be used to accurately model their system of interest.
summary:
哈密​​顿自适应分辨率模拟 (H-AdResS) 方法允许将原子和基于粒子的粗粒度模型组合在单个模拟框中，这使得它对于包含被交互环境包围的界面或反应区域的模型系统非常有吸引力。在我们之前的工作 [ arXiv:2604.21867 ] 中，我们在 LAMMPS 2023 中实现了 H-AdResS 并将其用途扩展到接口，重点以 MOF/CO$_2$ 接口为例。我们发现，尽管有其优点，但在此类系统中正确使用此方法并非易事。在这项工作中，深入分析了恒温方案和远程静电模型选择的影响。尽管其哈密顿公式能够在恒温系综中执行 H-AdResS 模拟，但并非每个恒温器都适合。我们证明 Langevin 恒温器是该方法的可靠选择，而 Nosé-Hoover 会产生伪影。此外，我们还表明，使用短程模型（例如静电阻尼位移力方法（H-AdResS 模拟的常用选择））在界面建模时可能会导致非物理结果。

还讨论了限制策略的必要性，以处理由于分辨率突然变化而引起的力和能量的不连续性。最后，讨论了改变 H-AdResS 哈密顿量的定义以包括键合自由度的逐步插值的可能性。我们希望本文的贡献可以帮助读者正确设置 H-AdResS 模拟，并评估该方法是否可用于准确地建模他们感兴趣的系统。

title: Intrinsic orbital Hall effect in a nonuniform electric field
abstract: Geometric analysis of electronic Bloch states offers a universal framework for understanding electronic properties, yet its role in the transport of orbital angular momentum remains unexplored. In this work, we establish an analytic connection between orbital angular momentum transport and the geometric properties of Bloch wave functions in electronic systems. Focusing on the intrinsic orbital Hall effect in the dc limit under a spatially nonuniform electric field, we show that its conductivity can be expressed in terms of universal geometric quantities, such as the orbital Berry curvature and quantum metric. This formulation provides a term-by-term correspondence with the geometric description of intrinsic charge Hall transport established in previous studies. Using a tight-binding model, we further illustrate that the higher-order orbital Hall response can exhibit enhanced sensitivity to the orientation of an anisotropic sample. Our work deepens the understanding of diverse intrinsic transverse transport phenomena and the role of quantum geometry in electronic systems.
summary: 电子布洛赫态的几何分析为理解电子特性提供了一个通用框架，但其在轨道角动量传输中的作用仍未被探索。在这项工作中，我们在电子系统中的轨道角动量传输和布洛赫波函数的几何特性之间建立了分析联系。着眼于空间非均匀电场下直流极限下的本征轨道霍尔效应，我们证明其电导率可以用通用几何量来表达，例如轨道贝里曲率和量子度量。该公式提供了与先前研究中建立的本征电荷霍尔传输的几何描述的逐项对应关系。使用紧束缚模型，我们进一步说明高阶轨道霍尔响应可以表现出对各向异性样品的方向的增强的敏感性。我们的工作加深了对各种固有横向传输现象以及量子几何在电子系统中的作用的理解。

title: Complex dynamics in the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick game
abstract: We study the outcome of adaptive learning of a large number of players engaging in sets of two-strategy two-player games. We are interested in typical games, and generate the payoff matrices at random at the beginning. The payoff matrices then remain fixed during the learning process. This provides a game theoretic foundation for the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) game, recently introduced by Garnier-Brun, Benzaquen and Bouchaud. The original model by these authors is a special case, with no bias towards any strategy. We here determine stability of learning for SK games with general random bias, and find that the nature of the stable state is affected by random fields. We also introduce a grand-canonical version of the SK game, in which players can choose to abstain. We determine the stability of learning for this game. Our analysis confirms that complex situations involving many players are frequently unlearnable, even if each player only chooses between two different actions. The rate with which players lose memory of past payoffs and the competitiveness of the game emerge as key parameters determining whether learning converges to a unique fixed point, whether there are many fixed points, or if the dynamics remains persistently volatile.
summary:
我们研究了参与两种策略两人游戏的大量玩家的适应性学习的结果。我们对典型的游戏感兴趣，并在开始时随机生成收益矩阵。然后，收益矩阵在学习过程中保持固定。这为 Garnier-Brun、 Benzaquen 和 Bouchaud 最近提出的 Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) 博弈提供了博弈论基础。这些作者的原始模型是一个特例，不偏向任何策略。我们在这里确定了具有一般随机偏差的 SK 游戏的学习稳定性，并发现稳定状态的性质受到随机场的影响。我们还推出了SK游戏的大规范版本，玩家可以选择弃权。我们确定这个游戏的学习稳定性。我们的分析证实，涉及许多玩家的复杂情况通常是无法学习的，即使每个玩家只在两个不同的行动之间进行选择。

玩家失去过去收益记忆的速度和游戏的竞争力成为关键参数，决定学习是否收敛到一个独特的固定点，是否有许多固定点，或者动态是否持续波动。

title: Curvature-induced host-mediated polarization of active particles
abstract: Polar collective motion commonly arises from alignment interactions, particle anisotropy, or an imposed directional bias. Here we identify a distinct route to polar order that does not rely on alignment interactions between the active particles. We show that non-aligning active Brownian particles embedded in a dense passive medium can develop polar coherence when confined to a compact curved surface. Persistent active motion redistributes stress through the host and creates passive-depleted regions. When the stress-spreading length becomes comparable to the sphere radius, these regions merge into elongated scars that channel active motion and, through feedback with the active flux, promote a common direction of motion. Removing the passive host suppresses polar coherence even though the active particles continue to cluster on the same sphere. Our results establish an environment-mediated route to collective polarity in which symmetry breaking emerges from the coupling between active motion, passive stress redistribution, and compact geometry.
summary: 极地集体运动通常由排列相互作用、粒子各向异性或强加的方向偏差引起。在这里，我们确定了一条不依赖于活性粒子之间的排列相互作用的极序的独特途径。我们证明，嵌入致密被动介质中的非排列活性布朗粒子在被限制在紧凑的曲面上时可以产生极性相干性。持续的主动运动通过宿主重新分配压力并创建被动耗尽区域。当应力传播长度与球体半径相当时，这些区域合并成细长的疤痕，引导主动运动，并通过主动通量的反馈，促进共同的运动方向。移除被动主体会抑制极性相干性，即使主动粒子继续聚集在同一球体上。我们的结果建立了一条环境介导的集体极性途径，其中主动运动、被动应力重新分布和紧凑几何结构之间的耦合出现了对称性破缺。

title: On the emergence of quantum many-body chaos for tunably-broken integrability
abstract: We develop a quantitative theory for the emergence of quantum many-body chaos as integrability is broken via a tunable parameter. In a circuit model of free fermions, 'doped' with a tunable density of integrability-breaking gates, we uncover the microscopic mechanisms underpinning the crossover from early-time integrable behaviour to late-time chaos through the lens of the out-of-time-ordered correlators (OTOCs). The integrability-breaking gates act as local, in spacetime, hotspots which locally amplify the OTOCs such that an accumulation of them eventually leads to fully-developed chaos. We identify the explicit characteristic time and length scales governing this crossover, as well as the dependence of the chaotic OTOC characteristics -- such as the butterfly velocity and front broadening -- on the integrability-breaking parameter.
summary: 我们开发了一种定量理论，用于描述当可调谐参数破坏可积性时量子多体混沌的出现。在自由费米子的电路模型中，“掺杂”了可调谐密度的可积分破坏门，我们通过失序相关器（OTOC）的镜头揭示了支撑从早期可积行为到晚期混沌交叉的微观机制。破坏可积性的门充当时空中的局部热点，局部放大 OTOC，使得它们的积累最终导致完全发展的混乱。我们确定了控制这种交叉的显式特征时间和长度尺度，以及混沌 OTOC 特征（例如蝶形速度和前沿展宽）对可积分破坏参数的依赖性。

title: Dirac oscillator in a helically twisted spacetime with axial torsion
abstract: We investigate the Dirac oscillator in a helically twisted spacetime endowed with a uniform axial torsion. Starting from an orthonormal coframe, we compute the Levi--Civita spin connection explicitly and separate the geometric contribution from the axial contortion. Retaining the matrix $\beta$ in the radial Moshinsky coupling, we show that the second-order problem is the ordered product $\hat\Pi_+\hat\Pi_-$ rather than the square of a single operator. The resulting radial dynamics is a coupled, self-adjoint two-component system in which the spin connection supplies the correct cylindrical radial operator, while the off-diagonal metric generates the helical combination $m/r-\omega k$ and a Coulomb-like geometric term. A finite-element solution reproduces the planar Dirac-oscillator spectrum in the flat limit and reveals asymmetric dependence on the longitudinal momentum, avoided level crossings, and a supersymmetric zero mode at $E=Mc^2$. The axial torsion and longitudinal momentum preserve this zero mode, whereas the helical twist lifts it quadratically. Sector-resolved thermodynamic functions are obtained from the relativistic bound-state spectrum. The explicit spinors further determine longitudinal vector and axial currents, and a Witten-index analysis identifies the helical twist as the deformation that removes the protected zero mode.
summary:
我们研究了具有均匀轴向扭转的螺旋扭曲时空中的狄拉克振荡器。从正交坐标系开始，我们显式计算 Levi-Civita 自旋连接，并将几何贡献与轴向扭曲分开。保留径向 Moshinsky 耦合中的矩阵 $\beta$，我们证明二阶问题是有序积 $\hat\Pi_+\hat\Pi_-$ 而不是单个算子的平方。由此产生的径向动力学是一个耦合的、自共轭的双分量系统，其中自旋连接提供正确的圆柱径向算子，而非对角度量则生成螺旋组合 $m/r-\omega k$ 和类库仑几何项。有限元解决方案在平坦极限下再现了平面狄拉克振荡器谱，并揭示了对纵向动量的不对称依赖性、避免了水平交叉以及 $E=Mc^2$ 处的超对称零模式。轴向扭转和纵向动量保持这种零模式，而螺旋扭转则以二次方方式提升它。扇区解析的热力学函数是从相对论束缚态谱中获得的。

显式旋量进一步确定纵向矢量和轴向电流，并且维滕指数分析将螺旋扭曲识别为消除受保护的零模式的变形。

title: What's the Matter with 3D Gravity?
abstract: We revisit the problem of minimally coupling matter to Einstein gravity in three dimensions with negative cosmological constant. By working in the worldline formalism, we construct a classical phase space on an initial time surface $\Sigma$, which we quantize using geometric quantization. States in the Hilbert space correspond to Virasoro conformal blocks with operators of conformal weight $h<c/24$. As an application of our formalism, we compute the partition function on thermal $\text{AdS}_3$ through equivariant localization. Our answer reproduces the AdS$_3$ Wilson spool and agrees with the known one-loop result. It further serves as a conjecture for the value of the path integral of gravity minimally coupled to a massive scalar field in thermal $\text{AdS}_3$ to all orders in $G_N$.
summary: 我们重新审视在具有负宇宙学常数的三维空间中最小化物质与爱因斯坦引力的耦合问题。通过世界线形式主义的工作，我们在初始时间表面 $\Sigma$ 上构造了一个经典相空间，并使用几何量化对其进行量化。希尔伯特空间中的状态对应于 Virasoro 共形块，其算子的共形权重 $h<c/24$。作为形式主义的应用，我们通过等变本地化计算热 $\text{AdS}_3$ 上的配分函数。我们的答案再现了 AdS$_3$ Wilson 线轴并与已知的单循环结果一致。它还可以推测与热 $\text{AdS}_3$ 中的巨大标量场最小耦合到 $G_N$ 中所有订单的重力路径积分的值。

title: The Art of Networking: Networks of Trivalent 10d Heterotic Junctions
abstract: We initiate the study of networks of 10d string theories connected by junctions implied by the cobordism conjecture. Focusing on the recently constructed junction of the three 10d non-tachyonic heterotic theories, we generalize its $(0, 1)$ heterotic worldsheet description to construct arbitrary networks. For one-dimensional networks, we formulate their topology in terms of graph theory and provide a simple worldsheet realization for general graphs. We then extend our analysis to higher-dimensional networks, describing e.g. nucleation in a theory of bubbles of pairs of other theories. We also discuss compact configurations, which define a novel class of compactifications in which different sectors propagate on different compact spaces, in a way reminiscent of compactifications on quantum geometries like $S^1 \vee S^1$.
summary: 我们开始研究由配边猜想所暗示的结点连接的 10 维弦理论网络。着眼于最近构建的三个 10d 非快子异质理论的连接，我们推广其 $(0, 1)$ 异质世界表描述来构造任意网络。对于一维网络，我们根据图论制定其拓扑，并为一般图提供简单的世界表实现。然后，我们将分析扩展到更高维度的网络，描述例如成对其他理论的气泡理论中的成核。我们还讨论了紧致配置，它定义了一类新颖的紧致化，其中不同的扇区在不同的紧致空间上传播，在某种程度上让人想起量子几何上的紧致化，如 $S^1 \vee S^1$。

title: Wormholes as red herrings: reflection positivity and the reconstruction of unitary quantum field theories
abstract: As Coleman famously argued, the apparent breakdown of partition-function factorization in quantum gravity associated with Euclidean wormholes is a red herring, arising from a hidden average over an ensemble of theories. We present a direct analog of Coleman's argument for the apparent breakdown of Hilbert-space factorization associated with spatial wormholes, i.e., Einstein--Rosen bridges. Our main result is the following reconstruction theorem for quantum field theories: unitary QFTs are determined, up to unitary isomorphism, by their closed-manifold partition functions; every reflection-positive partition function arises from a unitary quantum field theory; and the states prepared by manifolds span the space of invariant states under the reconstructed theory's symmetry group. Interpreting the result gravitationally, we conclude that any apparent breakdown of Hilbert-space factorization is a red herring, arising from restricting to an incomplete spectrum of charged states.
summary: 正如科尔曼著名的论点，与欧几里德虫洞相关的量子引力中的配分函数分解的明显崩溃是一个转移注意力的事情，它是由理论集合的隐藏平均值引起的。我们提出了科尔曼关于与空间虫洞（即爱因斯坦-罗森桥）相关的希尔伯特空间分解的明显崩溃的论点的直接类比。我们的主要结果是量子场论的以下重构定理：酉 QFT 是由它们的闭流形配分函数确定的，直到酉同构；每个反射正配分函数都源自酉量子场论；由流形准备的状态跨越了重构理论对称群下的不变状态空间。从引力角度解释结果，我们得出的结论是，希尔伯特空间分解的任何明显破坏都是转移注意力的，这是由于限制了不完整的带电态谱而引起的。

title: Algorithmic Dualization of Unitary Circular Quivers
abstract: We introduce a field-theoretic algorithm to find the $SL(2,\mathbb{Z})$ duality web of 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ circular quiver theories with unitary gauge groups, extending the algorithm for linear quivers. Although circular and linear quivers share the same local structure, the circular topology requires additional ingredients, which we formulate in terms of topological and baryonic QFT blocks, together with new $SL(2,\mathbb{Z})$ duality moves acting on them. For good circular quivers, this provides a field-theoretic derivation of mirror symmetry and extends it to the full $SL(2,\mathbb{Z})$ duality web. We then study bad circular quivers, distinguishing between local badness, associated with under-balanced gauge nodes, and global badness, arising from the circular topology itself. In particular, we analyze the magnetic and electric dual frames of globally bad circular quivers and provide additional evidence for the proposed duality by matching the Higgs branch index with the dual Coulomb branch index. The latter exhibits a structure reminiscent of permutation-group gauging and reveals a refined relation to the ADHM quiver, flowing to the $\mathcal{N}=8$ infrared fixed point.
summary: 我们引入了一种场论算法来查找具有酉规范组的 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ 圆形颤动理论的 $SL(2,\mathbb{Z})$ 对偶网络，扩展了线性颤动的算法。虽然圆形和线性箭袋共享相同的局部结构，但圆形拓扑需要额外的成分，我们根据拓扑和重子 QFT 块以及作用于它们的新 $SL(2,\mathbb{Z})$ 对偶移动来制定这些成分。对于良好的圆形箭袋，这提供了镜像对称的场论推导，并将其扩展到完整的 $SL(2,\mathbb{Z})$ 对偶网络。然后，我们研究不良的圆形颤动，区分与不平衡的规范节点相关的局部不良和由圆形拓扑本身引起的全局不良。特别是，我们分析了全局不良圆形箭袋的磁电双框架，并通过将希格斯分支指数与双库仑分支指数相匹配，为所提出的对偶性提供了额外的证据。后者表现出一种让人想起置换群计量的结构，并揭示了与 ADHM 颤动的精细关系，流向 $\mathcal{N}=8$ 红外固定点。

title: Quark Anti-Quark Fusion and Walking RG Flows
abstract: We study the fusion of two conjugate conformal line defects on the sphere. At small separation, their spectrum is governed by a universal Fusion Master Equation. Below a critical coupling, the fused defect has two conformal fixed points; at criticality, they collide and move into the complex plane, producing walking RG behaviour. Although individual energy levels then drift with the UV scale and are scheme dependent, the $SL(2,\mathbb{R})$ Casimir continues to commute with the Hamiltonian below that scale. This organises the spectrum into conformal families and fixes a universal, scheme-independent density of states. We derive this structure in the planar ladder model and obtain an exact finite-coupling description of conjugate $1/2$-BPS Wilson-line fusion in planar ${\cal N}=4$ SYM using the Quantum Spectral Curve. We test our results against perturbation theory and semiclassical string theory.
summary: 我们研究球体上两个共轭共形线缺陷的融合。在小间距下，它们的光谱由通用 Fusion Master 方程控制。在临界耦合以下，融合缺陷有两个共形固定点；在临界点，它们发生碰撞并进入复杂平面，产生步行 RG 行为。尽管各个能级随 UV 尺度漂移并且与方案相关，但 $SL(2,\mathbb{R})$ 卡西米尔继续与低于该尺度的哈密顿量交换。这将频谱组织成共形族，并确定了通用的、与方案无关的状态密度。我们在平面阶梯模型中推导了这种结构，并使用量子谱曲线获得了平面 ${\cal N}=4$ SYM 中共轭 $1/2$-BPS Wilson 线融合的精确有限耦合描述。我们根据微扰理论和半经典弦理论测试我们的结果。

title: Wigner negativity in Krylov space and emergent semiclassicality
abstract: We propose that the Krylov basis gives a semiclassical representation of dynamics in general large-$N$, complex, many-body systems. As a probe of this semiclassicality, we study the growth of Wigner negativity -- a measure of the complexity of classical simulation -- under time evolution in Krylov space in several solvable models. We begin with 2d CFTs, initially in either the vacuum or the thermofield double state on a line excited by a primary operator. In both cases, Wigner negativity remains an $O(1)$ constant and does not grow at late times, indicating approximately classical dynamics in the Krylov basis. We then study random matrix theory with the maximally entangled state between two copies as the initial state. For general one-cut matrix models, we argue that Wigner negativity in the Krylov basis grows as $t^{1/2}$ at large $O(1)$ times but does not scale with the Hilbert space dimension, thus indicating semiclassical dynamics in Krylov space. Finally, in the double-scaled SYK model, we find an approximately classical phase (constant negativity) at early times and a semiclassical phase ($t^{1/2}$ growth) at late times. In all these examples, Wigner negativity either remains constant or grows slowly, demonstrating emergent semiclassicality of dynamics in Krylov space.
summary:
我们提出 Krylov 基给出了一般大型、复杂、多体系统动力学的半经典表示。作为对这种半经典性的探索，我们研究了维格纳负性的增长——经典模拟复杂性的度量——在几个可解模型中克雷洛夫空间中的时间演化下。我们从 2d CFT 开始，最初处于由主算子激发的真空或热场双态。在这两种情况下，维格纳负性都保持 $O(1)$ 常数，并且不会在后期增长，这表明 Krylov 基中的近似经典动力学。然后，我们以两个副本之间的最大纠缠态作为初始状态来研究随机矩阵理论。对于一般的单割矩阵模型，我们认为 Krylov 基中的维格纳负性以 $t^{1/2}$ 的形式增长 $O(1)$ 倍，但不随希尔伯特空间维度缩放，从而表明 Krylov 空间中的半经典动力学。最后，在双尺度 SYK 模型中，我们发现早期有一个近似经典相（恒定负性），在晚期有一个半经典相（$t^{1/2}$ 增长）。

在所有这些例子中，维格纳负性要么保持不变，要么缓慢增长，证明了克雷洛夫空间中动力学的新兴半经典性。

title: Quantum JT Gravity in a box as a Pöschl-Teller Scattering Problem
abstract: We present a canonical quantization of Jackiw-Teitelboim gravity with finite Dirichlet boundary conditions, using the geodesic length between the two boundaries and its conjugate momentum as reduced phase space variables. The dynamics is recast as the scattering problem of a nonrelativistic particle in a repulsive Pöschl-Teller potential, naturally embedded within a hyperbolic reduction of the $\mathfrak{sl}(2,\mathbb{R})$ Casimir. We obtain exact wavefunctions of the universe and the disk partition function, interpreted as a transition matrix element between states of vanishing bare length. In the asymptotic limit, the theory reduces to Liouville quantum mechanics and reproduces the standard Schwarzian spectral density. At finite cutoff, however, the spectral measure exhibits genuinely nonperturbative corrections, absent in existing $T\bar T$ treatments. We also obtain closed form expressions for thermal two-point functions in terms of Wilson functions and propose diagrammatic rules for time- and out-of-time-ordered four-point functions. We further address the issue of the branch cut singularity of the quasi-local energy and propose a UV completion of the model in which the Brown-York charge is analytically continued beyond the black hole horizon. This continuation naturally extends the scattering problem to configurations that foliate the black hole interior.
summary:
我们提出了具有有限狄利克雷边界条件的 Jackiw-Teitelboim 引力的规范量子化，使用两个边界之间的测地线长度及其共轭动量作为简化的相空间变量。动力学被重新表述为排斥性 Pöschl-Teller 势中非相对论粒子的散射问题，自然嵌入到 $\mathfrak{sl}(2,\mathbb{R})$ 卡西米尔的双曲约简中。我们获得了宇宙的精确波函数和圆盘配分函数，将其解释为裸长度消失状态之间的过渡矩阵元素。在渐近极限下，该理论简化为刘维尔量子力学并再现了标准施瓦茨谱密度。然而，在有限截止值下，光谱测量表现出真正的非微扰校正，这在现有的 $T\bar T$ 处理中是不存在的。我们还根据威尔逊函数获得了热两点函数的封闭形式表达式，并提出了时间和非时间有序四点函数的图解规则。

我们进一步解决了准局域能量的分支切割奇点问题，并提出了模型的 UV 完成，其中 Brown-York 电荷在分析上继续超出黑洞视界。这种延续自然地将散射问题扩展到黑洞内部的叶状结构。

title: Preparing a Thermofield Double State with Feedback Quantum Algorithms
abstract: The efficient preparation of correlated thermal states, such as the Thermofield Double (TFD) state, is a fundamental prerequisite for simulating quantum gravity models and many-body thermodynamics on quantum processors. In this work, we investigate the ground state preparation of the Two Coupled Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev model, known as the Maldacena-Qi model, which is dual to a traversable wormhole in $AdS_2$, utilizing feedback-based quantum algorithms. We demonstrate that the standard feedback-based quantum algorithm (FALQON) and its time-rescaled variant (TR-FALQON) face severe kinetic limitations in this system, failing to converge to the highly entangled ground state when initialized in trivial product states. To overcome these barriers, we propose the hybrid ITE-TR-FALQON protocol, which integrates the imaginary-time evolution present in imaginary-time-enhanced FALQON (ITE-FALQON) with the time-rescaling mechanism. Our numerical results indicate that the introduction of non-unitary dynamics is strictly necessary to break symmetry traps and filter out excited states, while time-rescaling drastically accelerates algorithm convergence. The proposed method achieves fidelities close to unity and reproduces the von Neumann and Rényi entropy spectra of the exact TFD state with high precision.
summary:
相关热态的有效准备，例如热场双态（TFD），是在量子处理器上模拟量子引力模型和多体热力学的基本先决条件。在这项工作中，我们利用基于反馈的量子算法研究了双耦合 Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev 模型（称为 Maldacena-Qi 模型）的基态准备，该模型与 $AdS_2$ 中的可穿越虫洞对偶。我们证明了标准的基于反馈的量子算法（FALQON）及其时间重新缩放的变体（TR-FALQON）在该系统中面临着严重的动力学限制，在平凡的乘积态下初始化时无法收敛到高度纠缠的基态。为了克服这些障碍，我们提出了混合 ITE-TR-FALQON 协议，它将虚时间增强型 FALQON (ITE-FALQON) 中存在的虚时间演化与时间重新缩放机制集成在一起。我们的数值结果表明，引入非单一动力学对于打破对称陷阱和滤除激发态是严格必要的，而时间重新缩放大大加速了算法收敛。

该方法实现了接近统一的保真度，并高精度地再现了精确 TFD 状态的冯·诺依曼和 Rényi 熵谱。

title: Morse Bridge between Planar Kepler and Hyperbolic Landau Dynamics
abstract: We show that two paradigmatic systems, the planar Kepler--Coulomb problem and the Landau problem on the hyperbolic plane $H^2$, are connected by a common one-dimensional mediator: the Morse Hamiltonian. On the Kepler side, a Liouville transformation and coupling-constant metamorphosis turn the radial dynamics into the Morse problem, with the Kepler polar angle becoming the Morse evolution parameter. On the Landau side, horocyclic reduction of the hyperbolic magnetic dynamics gives the same Morse Hamiltonian, with a quantum half-density correction. Consequently, the radial Kepler problem and the fixed-horocyclic-momentum sectors of the hyperbolic Landau problem are mapped to one Morse spectral problem, relating their bound spectra, continuum thresholds, resonances and scattering data. We further show that the Landau time evolution has a Kepler-conic form and reduces to the bound, threshold and scattering trajectories of the Morse system. The resulting dictionary connects Kepler conics with magnetic circles, horocycles and hypercycles, and turns the magnetic $SL(2,\mathbb R)$ symmetry of the Landau problem into the spectrum-generating algebraic structure of the Morse system.
summary: 我们证明了两个范例系统，平面开普勒-库仑问题和双曲平面 $H^2$ 上的朗道问题，通过一个共同的一维中介：莫尔斯哈密顿量连接。在开普勒方面，刘维尔变换和耦合常数变形将径向动力学转化为莫尔斯问题，开普勒极角成为莫尔斯演化参数。在朗道一侧，双曲磁动力学的星环约简给出了相同的莫尔斯哈密顿量，并进行了量子半密度校正。因此，径向开普勒问题和双曲朗道问题的固定周环动量扇区被映射到一个莫尔斯谱问题，将它们的束缚谱、连续谱阈值、共振和散射数据关联起来。我们进一步表明，朗道时间演化具有开普勒圆锥形式，并简化为莫尔斯系统的界限、阈值和散射轨迹。由此产生的字典将开普勒圆锥曲线与磁圆、半周圆和超循环联系起来，并将兰道问题的磁性 $SL(2,\mathbb R)$ 对称性转化为莫尔斯系统的频谱生成代数结构。

title: Uniqueness and Analytic Structures of Bosonic String Effective Amplitudes
abstract: We revisit the zero-transcendentality sector of bosonic string effective amplitudes with spin-1 external states, conjectured to correspond to a mass-deformed $(DF)^2$ theory, known as the $(DF)^2{+}\text{YM}$ theory. Imposing gauge invariance, locality, and cyclicity under minimal assumptions uniquely fixes a set of dimension-raising operators and leads to a recursive construction of amplitudes from Yang-Mills amplitudes in the $\alpha'{\to}0$ limit. At finite $\alpha'$, certain derivative operators dressed with gauge invariant and $\alpha'$-dependent factors, what we call $\textit{inverse operators}$, reconstruct the full bosonic string effective amplitudes, yielding compact expressions that universally factorize into tachyon-pole coefficients times Yang-Mills-Scalar amplitudes. This structure holds at arbitrary multiplicity and also extends to the amplitudes of the pure $(DF)^2$, $(DF)^2{+}\phi^{3}$ and $(DF)^2{+}\text{YM}{+}\phi^{3}$ theories.
summary: 我们重新审视具有自旋 1 外部状态的玻色弦有效振幅的零超越性扇区，推测其对应于质量变形的 $(DF)^2$ 理论，称为 $(DF)^2{+}\text{YM}$ 理论。在最小假设下施加规范不变性、局域性和周期性，唯一地修复了一组维数提升算子，并导致从 $\alpha'{\to}0$ 限制内的 Yang-Mills 振幅递归构造振幅。在有限的 $\alpha'$ 下，某些导数算子带有规范不变性和 $\alpha'$ 相关因子，我们称之为 $\textit{逆算子}$，重建完整的玻色弦有效振幅，产生紧凑的表达式，该表达式普遍分解为快子极系数乘以杨米尔斯标量振幅。该结构在任意多重性下都成立，并且还扩展到纯 $(DF)^2$、$(DF)^2{+}\phi^{3}$ 和 $(DF)^2{+}\text{YM}{+}\phi^{3}$ 理论的幅度。

title: Lubkin-Page typicality bounds for Type~II von~Neumann factors
abstract: Typicality arguments for emergent spacetime rely on the Lubkin-Page bounds, which show that generic quantum states have vanishing correlations between subsystems. These bounds assume a tensor-product Hilbert space (a Type~I von~Neumann algebra), but the observable algebras in quantum field theory and quantum gravity are generically Type~II or Type~III, raising the question of whether the bounds survive. We prove that they do for all Type~II von~Neumann factors. For the hyperfinite Type~II$_1$ factor with a tripartite decomposition $R \cong A \otimes B \otimes E$, the mutual information between subsystems $A$ and $B$ vanishes as $O((d_A d_B / d_E)^2)$ in finite-dimensional approximations, provided $d_A d_B \leq d_E$ (Theorem~1). For Type~II$_\infty$ factors, including the gravitational algebras constructed via the crossed-product method by Witten and by Chandrasekaran, Longo, Penington, and Witten, the bound acquires an additional exponential suppression controlled by the Bekenstein-Hawking entropy (Theorem~2). We identify the obstructions to extending the result to Type~III factors and discuss the open question of whether the commutant of the observable algebra can serve as a natural thermal bath that tightens the bound further.
summary:
