涌现时空的典型性论证依赖于卢布金-佩奇边界，该边界表明通用量子态在子系统之间的相关性正在消失。这些界限假设张量积希尔伯特空间（I型冯诺依曼代数），但量子场论和量子引力中的可观测代数通常是Type~II或Type~III，这就提出了界限是否存在的问题。我们证明它们适用于所有 II 型冯诺依曼因子。对于具有三方分解 $R \cong A \otimes B \otimes E$ 的超有限 Type~II$_1$ 因子，子系统 $A$ 和 $B$ 之间的互信息在有限维近似中消失为 $O((d_A d_B / d_E)^2)$，前提是 $d_A d_B \leq d_E$（定理~1）。对于 Type~II$_\infty$ 因子，包括 Witten 和 Chandrasekaran、Longo、Penington 和 Witten 通过叉积方法构造的引力代数，界限获得由 Bekenstein-Hawking 熵控制的额外指数抑制（定理~2）。

我们确定了将结果扩展到 Type~III 因子的障碍，并讨论了可观测代数的交换子是否可以充当进一步收紧界限的天然温泉浴的悬而未决的问题。

title: Tuning quantum magic of pure quantum chaotic states with a gravity dual
abstract: Quantum magic is a fundamental resource that quantifies to what extent quantum states can be efficiently simulated on a classical computer. We study it for states constructed from the Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) Hamiltonian with $N$ Majoranas by the fermionic anti-flatness (FAF). We show analytically that, in the large $N$ limit, the quantum magic of pure Kourkoulou-Maldacena (KM) states, dual to a quantum black hole with an end-of-world particle behind the horizon, is linear in $N$ with a slope, depending on the black hole temperature, that can be tuned between zero and $1/2$. By contrast, the FAF of Gaussian states evolved in real time with the SYK Hamitonian approaches $\approx N/2$ exponentially at a rate given by a multiple of the leading Ruelle-Pollicot resonance. Subleading corrections in $N$ for SYK energy eigenstates, computed numerically for $N \leq 54$ by combining Krylov subspace with GPU acceleration techniques, decay exponentially with $N$, but power-law if the SYK couplings are sparsified, and are order of magnitude larger for states close to the ground state, a region with an established gravity analogue. Our results offer new insights about the relation between quantum information, quantum chaos and low-dimension quantum gravity.
summary:
量子魔法是一种基本资源，它量化了在经典计算机上可以有效模拟量子态的程度。我们研究了由 Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) 哈密顿量和 $N$ Majoranas 通过费米子反平坦度 (FAF) 构造的状态。我们通过分析表明，在大的 $N$ 极限下，纯 Kourkoulou-Maldacena (KM) 态的量子魔力（与地平线后面有世界末日粒子的量子黑洞对偶）在 $N$ 中呈线性，斜率取决于黑洞温度，可以在 0 到 $1/2$ 之间调整。相比之下，高斯态的 FAF 是实时演化的，SYK 哈密顿量接近 $\approx N/2$，其速率由领先的 Ruelle-Pollicot 共振的倍数给出。 SYK 能量本征态的 $N$ 的次领先修正，通过结合 Krylov 子空间与 GPU 加速技术对 $N \leq 54$ 进行数值计算，随 $N$ 呈指数衰减，但如果 SYK 耦合稀疏，则呈幂律，并且对于接近基态（具有已建立的重力模拟的区域）的状态来说，其数量级更大。

我们的研究结果为量子信息、量子混沌和低维量子引力之间的关系提供了新的见解。

title: Local symmetry and the dependence on extended spacetime
abstract: We show that linearised E theory possesses a local symmetry at low levels provided the parameters of the local symmetry obey differential conditions that restrict their dependence on the extended spacetime. In the decomposition of E theory that leads to Siegel theory, also known as Double Field theory, we also find the analogous restrictions on the parameters. They are different to the section conditions which are universally used in this context. We also show that the dilaton equation of Siegel theory is invariant under the local symmetry if the parameters satisfy an analogous non-linear constraint on the parameters. We argue that there is no need to impose conditions on the fields of E theory or Siegel theory.
summary: 我们证明，线性化 E 理论在低水平上具有局部对称性，前提是局部对称性的参数服从限制其对扩展时空依赖性的微分条件。在E理论的分解中，导致了Siegel理论，也称为双场理论，我们也发现了对参数的类似限制。它们与此上下文中普遍使用的部分条件不同。我们还证明，如果参数满足类似的非线性约束，则西格尔理论的膨胀方程在局部对称性下是不变的。我们认为没有必要对E理论或西格尔理论的领域强加条件。

title: Towards graviton lasing from squeezed ultra-cold systems
abstract: In our recent work, arXiv:2604.11474 [hep-th], we have shown that effective detection of gravitons is possible using an array of charged harmonic oscillators in a dynamical electromagnetic field. Using the interaction Hamiltonian of the identical model, we find out that a systematic way of population inversion of the gravitons is possible in ultra-cold atomic systems. We find out that the exponential growth depends strictly on the number of bosons in the system as well as their inherent squeezing of the matter wave packets. A coherent source of gravitons may lead directly to an unavoidable evidence on the existence of gravitons and based on this analysis we propose an experimental proposal for generating true graviton laser.
summary: 在我们最近的工作 arXiv:2604.11474 [hep-th] 中，我们证明了使用动态电磁场中的带电谐振子阵列可以有效检测引力子。利用相同模型的相互作用哈密顿量，我们发现在超冷原子系统中，引力子布居反转的系统方法是可能的。我们发现指数增长严格取决于系统中玻色子的数量以及它们对物质波包的固有挤压。引力子的相干源可能会直接导致不可避免的引力子存在的证据，并且基于此分析，我们提出了产生真正的引力子激光的实验建议。

title: Supersymmetric twists in twistor space and holography
abstract: We compute some supersymmetric twists of field theories in twistor space, including the minimal supersymmetric and the chiral algebra twists of supersymmetric self-dual Yang-Mills, and the minimal twist of $\mathcal{N}=1$ self-dual supergravity. In the case of $\mathcal{N}=4$ we also find their holographic duals in the framework of chiral holography. We find that the minimal twist of gauge theories in twistor space localizes them to spacetime, making the choice of complex structure manifest, and reproducing the minimal twist on spacetime. For superconformal theories we apply a further twist which localizes the theory to a plane contained on spacetime, reproducing the chiral algebra twist of $\mathcal{N}=4$ sYM. We show that the bulk duals of these twists also localize reproducing the results from twisted holography.
summary: 我们计算了扭量空间中场论的一些超对称扭曲，包括超对称自对偶杨米尔斯的最小超对称和手性代数扭曲，以及 $\mathcal{N}=1$ 自对偶超引力的最小扭曲。在 $\mathcal{N}=4$ 的情况下，我们还在手性全息框架中找到了它们的全息对偶。我们发现规范理论在扭量空间中的最小扭曲将它们局域于时空，使得复杂结构的选择变得明显，并再现了时空的最小扭曲。对于超共形理论，我们应用进一步的扭曲，将理论定位到包含在时空上的平面，再现 $\mathcal{N}=4$sYM 的手征代数扭曲。我们表明，这些扭曲的大量对偶也可以局部再现扭曲全息术的结果。

title: Black Holes and Random Variables
abstract: We formulate an avatar of the Fyodorov-Hiary-Keating conjecture for black hole microstate counts in quantum gravity. By holography, this implies sharp bounds on interval counts of high-dimension primary operators in conformal field theory. The extremal fluctuations of these counts are characterized by a random variable, with a prescribed tail distribution. At large $N$, these order-one erratic fluctuations set a quantitative limit on the resolution of the semiclassical AdS gravitational path integral. Gaussian random models for state counts arise naturally in this context; we express the phenomenon of erratic $N$-dependence in AdS/CFT as a decorrelation property of these models. Our broader point is to suggest that AdS black hole microstate spectra and their field theory duals should exhibit the extreme value statistics of random matrices, lying in the universality class of Gaussian log-correlated fields.
summary: 我们制定了量子引力中黑洞微观状态计数费奥多罗夫-希里-基廷猜想的化身。通过全息术，这意味着共形场论中高维初级算子的区间计数存在尖锐界限。这些计数的极值波动以随机变量为特征，具有规定的尾部分布。在较大的 $N$ 下，这些一阶不稳定波动对半经典 AdS 引力路径积分的分辨率设置了定量限制。用于状态计数的高斯随机模型在这种情况下自然出现；我们将 AdS/CFT 中不稳定的 $N$ 依赖性现象表示为这些模型的去相关属性。我们更广泛的观点是建议 AdS 黑洞微态谱及其场论对偶应该表现出随机矩阵的极值统计，位于高斯对数相关场的普适类中。

title: Boundary observables in string field theory
abstract: Starting from the gauge invariant action for free string field theory with boundary recently constructed in 2506.05969 , we define new gauge invariant observables which are analogous to the Brown-York charges of General Relativity. Just like the Brown-York charges, our observables originate from a boundary tadpole, and are associated to isometries of the SFT gauge group around a given background. The consistency of the construction requires the equation of motion of the background to be satisfied only at the boundary and therefore these observables can also be defined for backgrounds generated by sources in the bulk. As examples of our construction in open string field theory, we compute the flux through the boundary of constant electromagnetic field-strength solutions and the charge associated to the Coulomb solution. As a further example in closed string field theory, we characterize the infinite conserved charges associated to stringy-haired black-hole solutions in two-dimensional string theory. We also construct a generalization of these boundary observables to the full interacting string field theory.
summary: 从最近在 2506.05969 构建的边界自由弦场论规范不变作用出发，我们定义了新的规范不变可观测量，类似于广义相对论的 Brown-York 电荷。就像 Brown-York 电荷一样，我们的可观测量源自边界蝌蚪，并且与给定背景周围的 SFT 规范组的等距相关。构造的一致性要求背景的运动方程仅在边界处满足，因此这些可观测量也可以针对由大量源生成的背景来定义。作为我们在开弦场理论中构造的示例，我们计算通过恒定电磁场强度解的边界的通量以及与库仑解相关的电荷。作为闭弦场论中的另一个例子，我们描述了二维弦理论中与弦毛黑洞解相关的无限守恒电荷。我们还构建了这些边界可观测量到完整相互作用的弦场理论的推广。

title: BRST-BV approach to fields in Poincare patch of AdS
abstract: We use the Poincare parametrization of AdS space to develop a general BRST-BV approach for free fields. A general expression for the BRST-BV Lagrangian of fields with arbitrary masses and symmetry types is obtained. We apply this general framework to study totally symmetric massless, massive, and partially-massless fields with arbitrary integer spin and a continuous-spin field. For these fields, both the constrained and unconstrained BRST-BV formulations are developed. In addition, we demonstrate the matching between the obtained BRST-BV Lagrangian and the metric-like Lagrangian formulated in terms of the modified de Donder divergence. Finally, a realization of AdS space symmetries is obtained within the space of fields and antifields entering the BRST-BV formulation.
summary: 我们使用 AdS 空间的庞加莱参数化来开发自由场的通用 BRST-BV 方法。获得了具有任意质量和对称类型的场的BRST-BV拉格朗日的通用表达式。我们应用这个通用框架来研究具有任意整数自旋和连续自旋场的完全对称无质量、有质量和部分无质量场。对于这些领域，开发了受约束和无约束的 BRST-BV 公式。此外，我们还证明了所获得的 BRST-BV 拉格朗日量与根据修正的 de Donder 散度制定的类度量拉格朗日量之间的匹配。最后，在进入 BRST-BV 公式的场和反场的空间内获得了 AdS 空间对称性的实现。

title: Parent Hamiltonians of Ergodic Matrix Product States
abstract: Matrix product states (MPS) are quintessential examples of frustration-free gapped ground states of local interactions called parent Hamiltonians. In this work, we investigate parent Hamiltonians for a class of ergodic matrix product states (EMPS), which are MPS defined by site-dependent random tensors $\{X_j^{[k]}\}_{j=1}^D$ which are homogeneously distributed at every site $k$ in the spin chain. Here, the EMPS are not translation-invariant but rather statistically translation-invariant. Under a mild injectivity assumption, we show the thermodynamic limit of an EMPS is the unique frustration-free ground state of a parent Hamiltonian on the whole spin chain, which, depending on the statistical properties of the EMPS, may or may not be finite-range. In contrast to the translation-invariant regime, these Hamiltonians need not be gapped. Nevertheless, applying the martingale method while keeping track of local statistics gives conditions for a gap, in addition to pointing towards why there need not be a gap in general. We include examples of EMPS both with and without spectral gaps to illustrate our results.
summary: 矩阵积态 (MPS) 是称为父哈密顿量的局部相互作用的无挫折带隙基态的典型示例。在这项工作中，我们研究了一类遍历矩阵乘积状态 (EMPS) 的父哈密顿量，这些状态是由位点相关的随机张量 $\{X_j^{[k]}\}_{j=1}^D$ 定义的 MPS，这些张量均匀分布在自旋链中的每个位点 $k$ 上。这里，EMPS 不是平移不变的，而是统计上平移不变的。在温和的单射性假设下，我们证明了 EMPS 的热力学极限是整个自旋链上父哈密顿量的独特无挫折基态，根据 EMPS 的统计特性，它可能是有限范围的，也可能不是有限范围的。与平移不变机制相反，这些哈密顿量不需要有间隙。然而，在跟踪当地统计数据的同时应用鞅法除了指出为什么一般不需要存在差距之外，还为出现差距提供了条件。我们提供了带有和不带有光谱间隙的 EMPS 示例来说明我们的结果。

title: Small Denominators and Subresonant Accumulation in Weakly Nonlinear Dispersive Dynamics
abstract: We study a small-denominator mechanism in weakly nonlinear dispersive dynamics. After Fourier decomposition, a nonlinear dispersive equation becomes an infinite system of weakly coupled oscillators. Higher-order correction terms may then contain infinite families of nonresonant Fourier interactions whose detunings tend to zero. Such families do not produce exact secular terms, but their accumulated contribution may grow as a power of time. We call this effect subresonant accumulation. The rigorous part of the paper is the analysis of a model forced oscillator and of an abstract subresonant Duhamel sum. If the detuning and coefficients have the form $\Delta_n\sim c n^{-p}$ and $B_n\sim b n^{-\kappa}$, then the accumulated contribution grows as $t^{1-\alpha}$, where $\alpha=(\kappa-1)/p$. We then show how this mechanism appears in a quartic Fourier family for the Klein--Gordon dispersion law. For the full nonlinear partial differential equation we formulate a conditional approximation result: provided that all remaining resonant and almost resonant interactions are controlled, the subresonant term gives the leading long-time correction.
summary: 我们研究弱非线性色散动力学中的小分母机制。经过傅立叶分解后，非线性色散方程变成弱耦合振荡器的无限系统。高阶校正项可能包含无限的非共振傅立叶相互作用族，其失谐趋于零。这些家庭不会产生确切的世俗术语，但他们积累的贡献可能会随着时间的力量而增长。我们称这种效应为亚共振积累。本文的严谨部分是对模型受迫振荡器和抽象次谐振杜哈梅尔和的分析。如果失谐和系数的形式为 $\Delta_n\sim c n^{-p}$ 和 $B_n\sim b n^{-\kappa}$，则累积贡献将增长为 $t^{1-\alpha}$，其中 $\alpha=(\kappa-1)/p$。然后我们展示了这种机制如何出现在克莱因-戈登色散定律的四次傅里叶族中。对于完整的非线性偏微分方程，我们制定了一个条件近似结果：假设所有剩余的共振和几乎共振的相互作用都受到控制，则次共振项给出了领先的长时间校正。

title: $r$-deformed $α$-$z$-Rényi relative entropy
abstract: In this article, we consider the $r$-logarithm for defining three-parameter family of Rényi relative entropies that are generalization of the $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi relative entropies. All the members of $r$-deformed $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi relative entropies satisfy the necessary axioms to be a divergence. We expose the range of parameters $\alpha$, $z$ and $r$ for which the data processing inequality holds. We also establish that $r$-deformed $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi relative entropy is an upper bound of the Tsallis relative entropy. Now, we have two upper bounds of the Tsallis relative entropy, which are $r$-deformed $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi relative entropy and the other one, which is discussed in literature. We investigate the order relationship between these two upper bounds of the Tsallis relative entropy. We observe that our new upper bound is more tighter when applicable to the density operators.
summary: 在本文中，我们考虑使用 $r$-对数来定义 Rényi 相对熵的三参数族，它是 $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi 相对熵的推广。 $r$-变形的$\alpha$-$z$-Rényi 相对熵的所有成员都满足成为散度的必要公理。我们公开数据处理不等式成立的参数 $\alpha$、$z$ 和 $r$ 的范围。我们还确定 $r$ 变形的 $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi 相对熵是 Tsallis 相对熵的上限。现在，我们有了 Tsallis 相对熵的两个上限，一个是 $r$ 变形的 $\alpha$-$z$-Rényi 相对熵，另一个是文献中讨论过的。我们研究了 Tsallis 相对熵的这两个上限之间的顺序关系。我们观察到，当适用于密度算子时，我们的新上限更加严格。

title: Open-boundary integrable quantum circuits with different geometries
abstract: We present a complete classification of integrable Yang-Baxter quantum circuits with open boundary conditions and arbitrary circuit geometries. Starting from the standard transfer-matrix construction with two types of staggered inhomogeneities, we derive a general mapping that determines the arrangement of circuit gates in terms of the inhomogeneities and the system size. We conjecture that time-periodic quantum circuits are integrable whenever the local bulk and boundary gates satisfy the Yang-Baxter equation and the same bulk gate is applied exactly once per period to every nearest-neighbor pair of spins. Our construction also provides an algorithm to detect Yang-Baxter integrability for circuits with arbitrary geometries. Furthermore, we introduce a third type of inhomogeneity, denoted by $\rho$, and demonstrate that the minimum possible circuit depth is four. We show that when these $\rho$-inhomogeneities are placed at the endpoints and in their immediate neighborhood, the resulting boundary gates can be interpreted as single gates acting on multiple sites. Our construction is fully general and applies to regular $R$-matrices, both of difference and non-difference type, together with their associated boundary matrices. As an application, we consider two-qubit gates corresponding to 6- and 8-vertex $R$-matrices of non-difference form satisfying the Yang-Baxter equation, and we construct the associated reflection matrices that generate integrable quantum circuits.
summary:
我们提出了具有开放边界条件和任意电路几何形状的可积杨-巴克斯特量子电路的完整分类。从具有两种交错不均匀性的标准传递矩阵结构开始，我们得出了一个通用映射，该映射根据不均匀性和系统尺寸确定电路门的排列。我们推测，只要局部体门和边界门满足杨-巴克斯特方程，并且相同的体门在每个周期对每个最邻近的自旋对应用一次，时间周期量子电路就是可积的。我们的构造还提供了一种算法来检测具有任意几何形状的电路的 Yang-Baxter 可积性。此外，我们引入了第三种类型的不均匀性，用$\rho$表示，并证明最小可能的电路深度是四。我们表明，当这些 $\rho$-不均匀性放置在端点及其紧邻区域时，所得到的边界门可以解释为作用于多个站点的单个门。

我们的构造是完全通用的，适用于常规 $R$ 矩阵（差分和非差分类型）及其关联的边界矩阵。作为一个应用，我们考虑对应于满足 Yang-Baxter 方程的非差分形式的 6 和 8 顶点 $R$ 矩阵的两个量子位门，并构造生成可积量子电路的相关反射矩阵。

title: Mean-Field Bose--Einstein Condensation and Condensate Ideals in the Resolvent Algebra
abstract: This paper studies the imperfect Bose gas after the Kac density law and the mean-field Euler equations have selected a condensed density with positive zero-mode excess. In this BEC regime the selected chemical potential cancels the mean-field shift, so the selected one-particle Hamiltonian is exactly the free one. The resulting zero-mode covariance defines a mean-field BEC ideal in the resolvent algebra, while the nonregular quotient and the direct-integral center record distinct representation-theoretic data. Occupation-number and Brownian-loop formulations recover the same density selection, excess density, ODLRO data, local tests, and the separation between finite-density BEC and Buchholz's stricter infinite-occupation proper-condensate criterion.
summary: 本文研究了Kac密度定律和平均场欧拉方程选择了具有正零模过剩的凝聚密度后的不完美玻色气体。在此 BEC 体系中，选定的化学势抵消了平均场位移，因此选定的单粒子哈密顿量正是自由哈密顿量。由此产生的零模协方差定义了解析代数中的平均场 BEC 理想，而非常规商和直接积分中心记录了不同的表示理论数据。占据数和布朗环公式恢复了相同的密度选择、过剩密度、ODLRO 数据、局部测试以及有限密度 BEC 和 Buchholz 更严格的无限占据真凝聚准则之间的分离。

title: Mesoscopic Linear Statistics for Two Ensembles of Quantum Graphs
abstract: We study mesoscopic linear spectral statistics for two ensembles of random quantum graphs. These are defined by a discrete graph $G$ and a unitary-matrix-valued function $U(k)$ indexed by directed edges of $G$. The matrix function $U(k)$ is constructed from unitary matrices $U^{(v)}$ indexed by the neighbours of each vertex $v$. The first ensemble is obtained by sampling the underlying discrete graph uniformly from the set of $d$-regular graphs. The second ensemble is obtained by sampling $U^{(v)}$ uniformly from the Haar measure, independently for each vertex. We prove that the variance of a linear spectral statistic in the large graph limit on polynomial mesoscopic scales coincides with that of the Gaussian Orthogonal/Unitary Ensemble.
summary: 我们研究两个随机量子图系综的介观线性光谱统计。它们由离散图 $G$ 和由 $G$ 有向边索引的酉矩阵值函数 $U(k)$ 定义。矩阵函数 $U(k)$ 由酉矩阵 $U^{(v)}$ 构造而成，该矩阵由每个顶点 $v$ 的邻居索引。第一个集合是通过从 $d$-正则图集中均匀采样底层离散图来获得的。第二个集合是通过对每个顶点独立地从 Haar 度量中均匀采样 $U^{(v)}$ 来获得的。我们证明了多项式介观尺度上大图极限中线性谱统计量的方差与高斯正交/酉系综的方差一致。

title: On a Rosenzweig-Porter-type model
abstract: We consider a very general Rosenzweig-Porter-type model, $H=H_0+\lambda W$, where $H_0$ is an arbitrary Hermitian matrix and $W$ is a standard Wigner matrix. We precisely trace the localization properties of the eigenvectors and the eigenstate thermalisation hypothesis (ETH) as the coupling constant $\lambda$ interpolates between the trivial $\lambda=0$ case and the fully mean field regime of large $\lambda$. Our results hold uniformly in $H_0$ and $\lambda$, substantially generalising all previous local laws on deformed Wigner matrices even in the mean field regime. Our proof precisely captures the deterministic approximation to the resolvent which exhibits a strongly inhomogeneous structure. As a byproduct, we conclude the emergence of a mobility edge and study the phenomenon of re-entrant localization.
summary: 我们考虑一个非常通用的 Rosenzweig-Porter 型模型，$H=H_0+\lambda W$，其中 $H_0$ 是任意 Hermitian 矩阵，$W$ 是标准 Wigner 矩阵。当耦合常数 $\lambda$ 在平凡的 $\lambda=0$ 情况和大 $\lambda$ 的完全平均场状态之间插值时，我们精确地追踪特征向量和特征态热化假说 (ETH) 的局域特性。我们的结果在 $H_0$ 和 $\lambda$ 中一致成立，基本上概括了变形维格纳矩阵的所有先前局部定律，即使在平均场状态下也是如此。我们的证明精确地捕捉了对表现出强烈不均匀结构的分解物的确定性近似。作为副产品，我们总结了移动边缘的出现并研究了可重入定位现象。

title: Exact quantum time compatible with positive energy
abstract: What would it be like to be in a superposition of yesterday, today, and tomorrow? This question may seem at best entertaining, but it is necessary, and exploring it allows us to understand how exact irreversible clocks and change are possible, despite the Unruh-Wald and Hegerfeldt-Ruijsenaars no-go theorems forbidding them. Unruh and Wald (1989) proved that if energy is bounded from below, no observable can increase monotonically with the Schrödinger time parameter t. Perfectly monotonic clocks and irreversible observable changes (Hegerfeldt-Ruijsenaars, 1980) seem impossible. From the perspective of the Schrödinger time, the world appears in a superposition of different intrinsic clock states indicating different times and opposite time directions. This seems to directly contradict our daily experiences of time and change. I show that there is no contradiction: from an intrinsic perspective of the world, sharp irreversible changes do happen, because the macroscopic pointer states resolve the superposition of different times. Large-scale time-reversing or discontinuous transitions are not internally observable in the records. From the intrinsic perspective, an unbounded intrinsic-time translation generator plays the role of the Hamiltonian, generating only forward time evolution with respect to the intrinsic time, but not to the Schrödinger parameter t, which is thus not justified to play the role of time. This allows sharp time observables even if the external Hamiltonian is bounded from below. In addition, this leads to a stationary wavefunction of the universe satisfying a Wheeler-DeWitt-type equation, without assuming gravity.
summary:
处于昨天、今天和明天的叠加中会是什么样子？这个问题可能看起来很有趣，但它是必要的，探索它可以让我们理解精确的不可逆时钟和变化是如何可能的，尽管 Unruh-Wald 和 Hegerfeldt-Ruijsenaars 不可行定理禁止它们。 Unruh 和 Wald (1989) 证明，如果能量自下而上有界，则任何可观测量都不能随薛定谔时间参数 t 单调增加。完全单调的时钟和不可逆的可观察变化（Hegerfeldt-Ruijsenaars，1980）似乎是不可能的。从薛定谔时间的角度来看，世界表现为不同内在时钟状态的叠加，指示不同的时间和相反的时间方向。这似乎与我们对时间和变化的日常体验直接矛盾。我证明这并不矛盾：从世界的内在角度来看，确实会发生急剧的不可逆转的变化，因为宏观指针状态解决了不同时间的叠加。大规模时间反转或不连续转变在记录中无法内部观察到。

从内在角度来看，无界内在时间平移生成器扮演了哈密顿量的角色，仅生成相对于内在时间的正向时间演化，而不是薛定谔参数t，因此没有理由扮演时间的角色。即使外部哈密顿量是从下面限制的，这也允许尖锐的时间可观测量。此外，这导致宇宙的平稳波函数满足惠勒-德威特型方程，无需假设重力。

title: Logarithmic negativity typically equals exact entanglement cost
abstract: Quantum entanglement plays a leading role in modern understanding of physical systems, from quantum phases of matter to quantum gravity. In quantum information theory, one seeks operationally meaningful quantifiers of entanglement, which for large quantum systems are notoriously difficult to evaluate due to the lack of computationally efficient algorithms. In this Letter, we show that for large random induced mixed states the logarithmic negativity, an efficiently computable entanglement measure, generically coincides with the exact entanglement cost under positive-partial-transpose-preserving operations, thereby acquiring a precise operational interpretation. Our results establish logarithmic negativity as an exact characterization of entanglement in generic many-body states and provide a tractable route for quantifying entanglement in complex quantum systems.
summary: 量子纠缠在现代物理系统的理解中发挥着主导作用，从物质的量子相到量子引力。在量子信息论中，人们寻求具有操作意义的纠缠量词，对于大型量子系统来说，由于缺乏计算效率高的算法，纠缠量词很难评估。在这封信中，我们表明，对于大的随机诱导混合态，对数负性（一种有效可计算的纠缠度量）通常与正部分转置保留操作下的精确纠缠成本一致，从而获得精确的操作解释。我们的结果将对数负性确立为一般多体态中纠缠的精确表征，并为量化复杂量子系统中的纠缠提供了一条易于处理的途径。

title: Noisy quantum circuit simulation with the tensor jump method
abstract: Classical simulation of noisy quantum circuits is essential for validating algorithms, benchmarking hardware, and assessing error-mitigation strategies, but remains limited by the exponential cost of density-matrix methods and the high variance of standard trajectory sampling. We introduce a variance-aware tensor network framework that combines the tensor jump method with local TDVP gate evolution on matrix product states and sparse Pauli-Lindblad hardware noise models. Gates are applied as short variational evolutions on the MPS manifold, while noise is sampled per circuit window from Pauli-Lindblad jump sets with state-independent hazards and dissipative contractions that reduce to irrelevant global factors after renormalization. The method supports correlated multi-qubit Lindblad noise consistent with hardware connectivity, including long-range operators on non-adjacent qubits, enabling direct simulation of crosstalk and other connectivity-induced errors beyond local noise models. We develop two unbiased variance-aware unravelings. An analog unitary-mixture unraveling matches the Lindblad generator exactly under symmetric Gaussian or two-point angle laws, while a projector-jump unraveling yields state-independent hazards and closed-form variance laws. Both retain the standard 1/sqrt(N) Monte Carlo convergence but with reduced prefactors. Empirically, projector sampling strongly reduces trajectory variance and bond-dimension growth across many circuit architectures, whereas analog sampling is most effective at weak noise. We demonstrate accurate, scalable noisy-circuit simulation on a 25-qubit noisy XY quench and IBM's 127-qubit kicked-Ising benchmark with long-range depolarizing noise, achieving reduced Monte Carlo variance and favorable MPS bond-dimension growth compared with standard Kraus-insertion baselines.
summary:
噪声量子电路的经典模拟对于验证算法、基准测试硬件和评估误差缓解策略至关重要，但仍然受到密度矩阵方法的指数成本和标准轨迹采样的高方差的限制。我们引入了一种方差感知张量网络框架，该框架将张量跳跃方法与矩阵乘积状态上的局部 TDVP 门演化和稀疏 Pauli-Lindblad 硬件噪声模型相结合。门被应用为 MPS 流形上的短变分演化，而噪声是从 Pauli-Lindblad 跳跃集的每个电路窗口中采样的，具有与状态无关的危险和耗散收缩，在重正化后减少到不相关的全局因素。该方法支持与硬件连接一致的相关多量子位 Lindblad 噪声，包括非相邻量子位上的远程算子，从而能够直接模拟超出局部噪声模型的串扰和其他连接引起的错误。我们开发了两种无偏见的方差感知解法。

模拟酉混合解开在对称高斯或两点角定律下与 Lindblad 发生器完全匹配，而投影仪跳跃解开产生与状态无关的危险和闭合形式方差定律。两者都保留了标准 1/sqrt(N) 蒙特卡罗收敛，但减少了前置因子。根据经验，投影仪采样极大地降低了许多电路架构中的轨迹方差和键合尺寸增长，而模拟采样对于弱噪声最为有效。我们在 25 量子位噪声 XY 淬灭和 IBM 的 127 量子位 kicked-Ising 基准上演示了精确、可扩展的噪声电路模拟，具有长程去极化噪声，与标准 Kraus 插入基准相比，实现了蒙特卡罗方差的减少和有利的 MPS 键维增长。

title: One-Body Purity, Non-Gaussianity, and Entanglement in Interacting Integrable Models
abstract: When describing entanglement in typical midspectrum eigenstates of many-body lattice Hamiltonians, two paradigms have emerged that capture the behavior observed in integrable and nonintegrable systems, Haar-random fermionic Gaussian states and Haar-random pure states, respectively. Remarkably, the former capture the behavior of interacting integrable systems, whose eigenstates are non-Gaussian. We argue that the paradigm that captures both the entanglement properties and the lack of Gaussianity in integrable systems is that of random superpositions of polynomially many Gaussian states. In contrast, eigenstates of nonintegrable systems are consistent with being described by random superpositions of exponentially many Gaussian states. We gain this understanding by comparing analytical and numerical results for the one-body purity, the non-Gaussianity, and the entanglement entropy of the random superpositions and the Hamiltonian eigenstates.
summary: 在描述多体晶格哈密顿量的典型中谱本征态中的纠缠时，出现了两种范式，分别捕获可积和不可积系统中观察到的行为，分别是哈尔随机费米子高斯态和哈尔随机纯态。值得注意的是，前者捕获了相互作用的可积系统的行为，其本征态是非高斯的。我们认为，捕捉可积系统中纠缠性质和高斯性缺失的范式是多项式多个高斯态的随机叠加。相反，不可积系统的本征态与由指数级多个高斯态的随机叠加所描述的一致。我们通过比较单体纯度、非高斯性以及随机叠加和哈密顿本征态的纠缠熵的分析和数值结果来获得这种理解。

title: Ravines in quantum cost landscapes: opportunities for improved VQA predictions
abstract: The geometric and topological structure of quantum cost landscapes (QCLs) governs the optimization and thus the predictive power of variational quantum algorithms (VQAs). We systematically analyze ravines - low-cost paths connecting local minima - using an adapted version of the nudged elastic band (NEB) algorithm, a method originating from theoretical chemistry. By training quantum neural networks (QNNs) to classify the concentratable entanglement of quantum states, we apply the NEB algorithm and numerically identify ravine structures in QCLs of hardware-efficient ansatzes. Beyond visualizing these ravines, we construct an ensemble prediction framework by averaging predictions from QNNs parameterized along the low-cost NEB path. We introduce a resource-light pre-training metric which quantifies local-prediction variability and serves as a strong performance indicator for VQAs, even beyond the scope of this study. When base classifiers are drawn from circuit and weight initializations exhibiting high local-prediction variability, the quantum-based NEB ensembles outperform both classical and naive quantum alternatives. Moreover, a complexity analysis shows that leveraging the ravine-like structure of QCLs with the QNN NEB approach substantially reduces computational costs compared to naive QNN ensembling. A depth and qubit scaling analysis indicates that ravines persist across both scalings, and that, despite the expected growth in resource requirements with the qubit scaling, the NEB approach also accelerates convergence over the naive alternative.
summary:
量子成本景观 (QCL) 的几何和拓扑结构控制着优化，从而控制着变分量子算法 (VQA) 的预测能力。我们使用微调弹性带 (NEB) 算法的改编版本（一种源自理论化学的方法）系统地分析峡谷 - 连接局部最小值的低成本路径。通过训练量子神经网络 (QNN) 对量子态的可集中纠缠进行分类，我们应用 NEB 算法并以数字方式识别硬件高效模拟的 QCL 中的沟壑结构。除了可视化这些峡谷之外，我们还通过对沿低成本 NEB 路径参数化的 QNN 的预测进行平均，构建了一个集成预测框架。我们引入了一种轻资源预训练指标，它可以量化本地预测的变异性，并作为 VQA 的强大性能指标，甚至超出了本研究的范围。当从表现出高局部预测可变性的电路和权重初始化中提取基本分类器时，基于量子的 NEB 集成优于经典和朴素量子替代方案。

此外，复杂性分析表明，与简单的 QNN 集成相比，通过 QNN NEB 方法利用 QCL 的沟壑状结构可大大降低计算成本。深度和量子位扩展分析表明，在两种扩展中都存在沟壑，并且尽管量子位扩展预计资源需求会增长，但 NEB 方法也加速了相对于朴素替代方案的收敛。

title: Decoupling band topology from criticality in bosonic systems
abstract: A new understanding of criticality in systems described by quadratic bosonic Hamiltonians (QBHs) ties the emergence of long-range correlations to boundaries of dynamical, not thermodynamical, stability in the parameter space. This separation occurs because the solution of the Heisenberg equations of motion is determined by an auxiliary pseudo- Hermitian dynamical system. The boundary points of a region of dynamical stability can be either exceptional points, generically associated with long-range correlations, or Krein collisions, where correlations can be either long- or short-range. We investigate the interplay of this landscape of possibilities with band topology and boundary physics, by relying on both specific examples and general arguments. The examples stem from a two-parameter, thermodynamically unstable family of QBHs obtained from the bosonic Su-Schrieffer-Heeger model by breaking particle conservation while preserving a chiral pseudo-symmetry. The dynamically stable regime breaks up into different regions labeled by an integer-valued symplectic analogue of the Berry phase. The topological phase transition is a line of Krein collisions, which coincides with the closing of a band gap at zero and causes the localization length of the topologically mandated boundary zero modes to diverge before disappearing. In the unstable regime, we show that the chiral pseudo-symmetry of our model induces, despite the broken particle-number symmetry, enough structure on its associated dynamical matrices to support a topological classification and a bulk-boundary correspondence, independently of dynamical stability. This strongly suggests that bosonic topological physics extracted from basic index theory is insensitive to dynamical stability and, a posteriori, to non-interacting criticality.
summary:
对二次玻色哈密顿量 (QBH) 描述的系统临界性的新理解将长程相关性的出现与参数空间中动力学而非热力学稳定性的边界联系起来。出现这种分离是因为海森堡运动方程的解是由辅助伪埃尔米特动力系统确定的。动态稳定区域的边界点可以是异常点（通常与长程相关性相关），也可以是 Kerin 碰撞（其中相关性可以是长程相关性或短程相关性）。我们通过具体的例子和一般的论点来研究这种可能性景观与能带拓扑和边界物理的相互作用。这些例子源于两个参数、热力学不稳定的 QBH 家族，该家族是通过打破粒子守恒同时保留手性伪对称性而从玻色子 Su-Schrieffer-Heeger 模型获得的。动态稳定状态分为不同的区域，由贝里相的整数值辛类似物标记。

拓扑相变是一条 Kerin 碰撞线，它与带隙在零处闭合一致，并导致拓扑规定的边界零模式的局域长度在消失之前发散。在不稳定状态下，我们表明，尽管粒子数对称性被破坏，但模型的手性赝对称性在其相关的动力学矩阵上诱导出足够的结构来支持拓扑分类和体边界对应，而与动态稳定性无关。这有力地表明，从基本指数理论中提取的玻色子拓扑物理对动态稳定性不敏感，并且事后对非相互作用临界性不敏感。

title: Mechanistic Interpretability and Causal Feature Steering of Neural Quantum States via Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: Neural Quantum States (NQS) are a remarkably expressive class of variational ansätze for quantum many-body wavefunctions, yet little is understood about their internal mechanisms: trained on variational objectives alone, how do NQS accurately capture physical observables that they have never been explicitly optimized for? In this work, we present a systematic approach to analyze the internal activations of NQS using sparse autoencoders. We extract features from the residual stream and demonstrate that these features strongly correlate with physical observables such as order parameters, staggered magnetization, and half-chain correlators, across both ground state representation and real-time dynamics. Remarkably, the discovery of these features is entirely unsupervised, with no physical labels provided. We further establish that such features causally affect the corresponding observables predicted by NQS, by showing that targeted, post-training intervention on a \textit{single} feature smoothly and monotonically steers the corresponding observable, while leaving the variational energy nearly unchanged. These results demonstrate that NQS are not merely functional approximators, but encode rich, interpretable internal representations of physical information. Our approach provides both a diagnostic and an intervention tool for NQS, and serves as a foundation for using mechanistic interpretability towards more reliable, transparent NQS.
summary:
神经量子态（NQS）是量子多体波函数的一类非常具有表现力的变分分析，但对其内部机制知之甚少：仅针对变分目标进行训练，NQS 如何准确捕获从未明确优化过的物理可观测量？在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用稀疏自动编码器分析 NQS 内部激活的系统方法。我们从残余流中提取特征，并证明这些特征与基态表示和实时动力学中的物理可观测值（例如序参数、交错磁化强度和半链相关器）强烈相关。值得注意的是，这些特征的发现完全是在无人监督的情况下进行的，也没有提供任何物理标签。我们通过表明对 \textit{single} 特征的有针对性的训练后干预平滑且单调地引导相应的可观测值，同时保持变分能量几乎不变，进一步确定这些特征因果地影响 NQS 预测的相应可观测值。

这些结果表明，NQS 不仅仅是函数逼近器，而且编码了丰富的、可解释的物理信息的内部表示。我们的方法为 NQS 提供了诊断和干预工具，并作为使用机械可解释性实现更可靠、透明的 NQS 的基础。

title: Design rules for fault-tolerant multi-gate teleportation
abstract: Multi-gate teleportation (MGT) packages $n$ remote gates into a single ebit via a 1-ebit fan-out quantum circuit, saving $n{-}1$ entangled pairs relative to sequential gate teleportation. The cost is a correlated failure mode: a single network fault propagates through the fan-out tree, injecting a weight-$n$ Pauli error. We derive a design rule for fault-tolerant packet sizes, $\nmax^{\text{corr}}(d) = \lceil d/2 \rceil$ for rotated surface codes of distance~$d$ with a correlation-aware decoder ($\nmax^{\text{naive}} = \lfloor d/2 \rfloor$ without), bounding how many gates can be packaged whilst preserving fault tolerance. Simulation with PyMatching shows that the standard MWPM decoder built from the packet circuit's noise model naturally corrects the correlated error: at network-to-local noise ratios $\gamma = \pnet/\pgate$ up to $100$, the packet matches or surpasses the per-link sequential LER at moderate-to-high $\gamma$, with the advantage growing with both $\gamma$ and $d$, whilst reducing the entanglement cost from $n$ ebits to~$1$. Packetisation wins when the network is the bottleneck ($\gamma \gg 1$); at $\gamma \approx 1$ the $n{-}1$ extra local fan-out gates offset the network savings. No custom decoder is required: the circuit-level noise model already encodes the correlation. These results enable noise-aware distributed circuit compilers to favour fan-out packetisation without sacrificing fault tolerance.
summary:
多门隐形传态 (MGT) 通过 1-ebit 扇出量子电路将 $n$ 个远程门封装到单个 ebit 中，相对于顺序门隐形传态节省 $n{-}1$ 纠缠对。成本是相关的故障模式：单个网络故障通过扇出树传播，注入权重$n$泡利错误。我们推导了容错数据包大小的设计规则，$\nmax^{\text{corr}}(d) = \lceil d/2 \rceil$，用于距离~$d$ 的旋转表面代码，具有相关感知解码器（$\nmax^{\text{naive}} = \lfloor d/2 \rfloor$ 没有），限制了可以封装多少个门，同时保持容错能力。 PyMatching 的仿真表明，根据数据包电路的噪声模型构建的标准 MWPM 解码器自然会纠正相关误差：在网络与本地噪声比 $\gamma = \pnet/\pgate$ 高达 $100$ 时，数据包在中到高 $\gamma$ 下匹配或超过每链路顺序 LER，优势随着 $\gamma$ 和 $d$ 的增加而增加，同时减少 $n$ 的纠缠成本至~$1$。

当网络是瓶颈时，分组化获胜（$\gamma \gg 1$）；在 $\gamma \approx 1$ 处，$n{-}1$ 额外的本地扇出门抵消了网络节省。不需要定制解码器：电路级噪声模型已经对相关性进行了编码。这些结果使得噪声感知分布式电路编译器能够在不牺牲容错能力的情况下支持扇出分组化。

title: Decohered toric code under quantum damping noise and its mapping to a classical spin model
abstract: We investigate properties of toric codes under realistic damping error channels, which include squeezing, thermal and non-Markovian effects. First, we map the decohered toric code under the generalized amplitude-damping (GAD) and the squeezed generalized amplitude-damping (SGAD) channels to the statistical-mechanical models using the double Hilbert-space formalism. Second, we map the action of the GAD and SGAD channels on the toric code to stochastic Pauli-type errors via Pauli twirling, yielding asymmetric depolarizing channels, and obtain the logical failure probabilities as a function of temperature and squeezing. In both cases, we relate the channel parameters of the GAD and SGAD channels to the spin-coupling constants of the statistical-mechanical model.
summary: 我们研究了现实阻尼误差通道下环面代码的特性，其中包括挤压、热和非马尔可夫效应。首先，我们使用双希尔伯特空间形式将广义振幅阻尼（GAD）和压缩广义振幅阻尼（SGAD）通道下的退相干环面码映射到统计力学模型。其次，我们通过泡利旋转将 GAD 和 SGAD 通道对环面码的作用映射到随机泡利型误差，产生不对称去极化通道，并获得作为温度和挤压函数的逻辑故障概率。在这两种情况下，我们将 GAD 和 SGAD 通道的通道参数与统计力学模型的自旋耦合常数相关联。

title: Coherent states in minimal-length Quantum Mechanics: inequivalent characterizations and emergent squeezing
abstract: Several approaches to quantum gravity suggest the emergence of a fundamental minimal length at the Planck scale. In quantum mechanics, this feature is naturally encoded through deformations of the Heisenberg algebra, leading to the Generalized Uncertainty Principle (GUP). While the phenomenological implications of GUP have been extensively explored, a consistent characterization of coherent states in minimal-length quantum mechanics remains elusive. In this work, we present a systematic analysis of coherent states for the one-dimensional harmonic oscillator. We show that the canonical equivalence among their standard characterizations - as eigenstates of the annihilation operator, displaced vacuum states and minimum-uncertainty wave packets - is generically lost in the presence of a minimal length. We then investigate the dynamical and semiclassical consequences of this inequivalence by comparing the evolution of generalized coherent states with that of states saturating the GUP. In particular, we demonstrate that minimal-length effects induce nontrivial deformations of phase-space trajectories and give rise to an intrinsic squeezing mechanism with no counterpart in ordinary quantum mechanics. These results establish a unified framework for coherence in GUP-based quantum theories and identify distinctive semiclassical signatures of minimal-length physics, opening a new avenue for probing quantum-gravitational effects.
summary:
量子引力的几种方法表明普朗克尺度上基本最小长度的出现。在量子力学中，这一特征是通过海森堡代数的变形自然编码的，从而产生了广义不确定性原理（GUP）。虽然 GUP 的现象学含义已被广泛探索，但最小长度量子力学中相干态的一致表征仍然难以捉摸。在这项工作中，我们对一维谐振子的相干态进行了系统分析。我们证明，它们的标准特征（作为湮没算子的本征态、位移真空态和最小不确定性波包）之间的典型等价性在存在最小长度的情况下通常会丢失。然后，我们通过比较广义相干态的演化与 GUP 饱和状态的演化来研究这种不等式的动力学和半经典后果。

特别是，我们证明了最小长度效应会引起相空间轨迹的非平凡变形，并产生普通量子力学中没有对应物的固有挤压机制。这些结果为基于 GUP 的量子理论的相干性建立了一个统一的框架，并确定了最小长度物理学的独特半经典特征，为探测量子引力效应开辟了一条新途径。

title: Lamb Shift of a Static Atom Facing a Rotating Surface
abstract: We study how the Lamb shift of a static atom is modified when a nearby planar body rotates rigidly about its normal while the atom is held at a fixed distance $a$. We derive a general formula for the shift in terms of the angularly Doppler-shifted reflection coefficients of the surface, valid for any axially symmetric planar material. Expanding the result to second order in the angular velocity $\Omega$, we identify two independent contributions associated with the orbital and spin components of the electromagnetic angular momentum. The orbital contribution, proportional to $(\Omega\rho)^2$, reproduces locally the Lamb shift induced by a surface translating at the tangential velocity $\Omega\rho$, whereas the spin contribution, proportional to $(a\Omega)^2$, originates from the rotational Doppler shift of the photon helicity and survives even on the rotation axis. We first illustrate the formalism using a graphene sheet and then apply it to finite-thickness Drude and plasma conductors and to doped semiconductors. Rotation enhances the Casimir-Polder interaction for graphene and metallic surfaces, whereas it weakens it for doped semiconductors, depending on whether the carrier plasma frequency reaches the near-field scale $1/a$. Above a threshold angular velocity, the atomic level also acquires a finite linewidth, providing a spectroscopic signature of quantum friction.
summary:
我们研究当附近的平面体绕其法线刚性旋转而原子保持在固定距离 $a$ 时，静态原子的兰姆位移如何被修改。我们根据表面的角多普勒偏移反射系数推导了偏移的通用公式，该公式对于任何轴对称平面材料都有效。将结果扩展到角速度 $\Omega$ 的二阶，我们确定了与电磁角动量的轨道和自旋分量相关的两个独立贡献。轨道贡献与 $(\Omega\rho)^2$ 成正比，局部再现由以切向速度 $\Omega\rho$ 平移的表面引起的兰姆频移，而自旋贡献与 $(a\Omega)^2$ 成正比，源自光子螺旋度的旋转多普勒频移，甚至在旋转轴上也存在。我们首先使用石墨烯片说明形式主义，然后将其应用于有限厚度的德鲁德和等离子体导体以及掺杂半导体。

旋转增强了石墨烯和金属表面的卡西米尔-波尔德相互作用，而减弱了掺杂半导体的卡西米尔-波尔德相互作用，具体取决于载流子等离子体频率是否达到近场尺度 $1/a$。在阈值角速度之上，原子水平也获得有限的线宽，提供量子摩擦的光谱特征。

title: Chiral interaction enhanced magnon bundle emission
abstract: In this paper, we suggest a chiral interaction scheme to enhance magnon bundle emission by placing a qubit and a magnon into a cascaded-cavity setup, respectively. It is found that the unidirectional interaction prolongs the lifetime of the target excited state, thereby suppressing the magnon re-excitation and promoting both the average purity and number of two-magnon bundles. Consequently, the chiral interaction not only offers directional control but also improves the quality of the multi-magnon source, which may find potential applications in quantum information processing.
summary: 在本文中，我们提出了一种手性相互作用方案，通过将量子位和磁振子分别放置到级联腔设置中来增强磁振子束发射。研究发现，单向相互作用延长了目标激发态的寿命，从而抑制了磁振子重激发，提高了双磁振子束的平均纯度和数量。因此，手性相互作用不仅提供了方向控制，而且还提高了多磁振子源的质量，这可能在量子信息处理中找到潜在的应用。

title: Performance of a two-mode coherent superposed channel in continuous-variable quantum teleportation
abstract: Glauber's coherent state is denoted by $\ket{\alpha}$ and its two-mode extension is represented by $\ket{\alpha,\beta}$. In this work, we introduce a two-mode superposition operator $A=tab+ra^\dagger b^\dagger$, whose action on the two-mode coherent state produces the two-mode coherent superposed quantum state $\ket{\psi}=(tab+ra^\dagger b^\dagger)\ket{\alpha,\beta}$. We investigate the nonclassicality and quantum non-Gaussianity of this state by means of the Wigner distribution and Wigner logarithmic negativity. Once its intrinsic nonclassical and non-Gaussian structure is established, the state is employed as the entangled resource in the Braunstein-Kimble continuous-variable (CV) teleportation protocol. We compute the ideal teleportation fidelity for coherent and squeezed inputs and analyze how the strengths of nonclassicality and non-Gaussianity influence the teleportation efficiency. Our results identify specific parameter regimes where enhanced non-Gaussian features or increased nonclassicality enable fidelities beyond the classical threshold, thereby revealing the operational significance of engineered two-mode quantum states in CV quantum information processing.
summary: 格劳伯相干态用 $\ket{\alpha}$ 表示，其二模扩展用 $\ket{\alpha,\beta}$ 表示。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个二模叠加算子$A=tab+ra^\dagger b^\dagger$，它对二模相干态的作用产生了二模相干叠加量子态$\ket{\psi}=(tab+ra^\dagger b^\dagger)\ket{\alpha,\beta}$。我们通过维格纳分布和维格纳对数负性来研究该状态的非经典性和量子非高斯性。一旦建立了其内在的非经典和非高斯结构，状态就被用作 Braunstein-Kimble 连续变量 (CV) 隐形传态协议中的纠缠资源。我们计算相干和压缩输入的理想隐形传态保真度，并分析非经典性和非高斯性的强度如何影响隐形传态效率。我们的结果确定了特定的参数范围，其中增强的非高斯特征或增加的非经典性使保真度超出经典阈值，从而揭示了工程双模量子态在 CV 量子信息处理中的操作意义。

title: Extracting Work from Discrete Quantum Polytropic Processes
abstract: We establish an upper bound on extractable work for time-dependent, non-Markovian quantum heat engines operating with finite baths. This bound analytically isolates the distinct thermodynamic penalties arising from system-bath correlations, bath non-equilibrium, and residual interaction energy. Evaluating this framework operationally via a quantum polytropic cavity-optomechanical cycle, we demonstrate that maximal efficiency requires quasi-static operation to successfully harvest coherent, non-Markovian system-bath resonances. Conversely, optimising for maximum power enforces a strict finite-time regime. Under realistic hardware constraints, this acceleration necessitates larger discrete operational steps, where we expect Trotterisation errors to manifest as physical noise. Such noise would irreversibly suppress delicate quantum memory effects, forcing a collapse to the memoryless Markovian Otto limit. Coupled with the permanent energetic tax of switching finite-bath interactions, our results indicate that the exploitation of quantum memory resources and finite-power operation belong to different operational regimes.
summary: 我们为在有限浴中运行的时间相关的非马尔可夫量子热机建立了可提取功的上限。该界限分析地隔离了由系统浴相关性、浴非平衡和残余相互作用能引起的不同热力学惩罚。通过量子多变腔光机械循环对这个框架进行操作评估，我们证明了最大效率需要准静态操作才能成功收获相干的非马尔可夫系统浴共振。相反，优化最大功率会强制执行严格的有限时间制度。在现实的硬件限制下，这种加速需要更大的离散操作步骤，我们预计 Trotterification 错误会表现为物理噪声。这种噪声将不可逆地抑制微妙的量子记忆效应，迫使其崩溃到无记忆马尔可夫奥托极限。加上切换有限浴相互作用的永久能量负担，我们的结果表明量子存储资源的利用和有限功率操作属于不同的操作机制。

title: Low-ancilla block encodings via Hamiltonian simulation
abstract: Block encodings are a central primitive in quantum algorithms, but standard constructions typically require logarithmic ancilla overhead and complicated controlled operations. Recent lower bounds further show that such ancilla overhead is unavoidable for exact constructions in broad circuit models. We show that this barrier can be bypassed in the approximate setting. Specifically, we present a simple single-ancilla construction that converts Hamiltonian evolution into a block encoding of the underlying Hamiltonian, via generalized quantum signal processing. For operators given by Hermitian decompositions $A=\sum_{j=1}^L \alpha_j H_j$, we instantiate this block-encoding construction in two ways, which differ in how the required Hamiltonian evolution is implemented. Using higher-order Trotterization, we obtain an $\varepsilon$-approximate block encoding of $A$ with only one ancilla qubit and circuit depth $\widetilde O\big(L(\alpha/\varepsilon)^{o(1)}\big),$ where $\alpha=\sum_j \alpha_j$. Using multiproduct formulas, we obtain circuit depth $\widetilde O(L)$, at the cost of $O(\log\log(1/\varepsilon))$ ancilla qubits. Our constructions provide alternatives to the standard LCU framework, with a focus on reducing the number of ancilla qubits while maintaining (near-)optimal circuit depth.
summary:
块编码是量子算法中的核心原语，但标准结构通常需要对数辅助开销和复杂的受控操作。最近的下限进一步表明，对于广泛电路模型中的精确构造来说，这种辅助开销是不可避免的。我们证明，在近似设置下可以绕过这个障碍。具体来说，我们提出了一种简单的单辅助结构，通过广义量子信号处理将哈密顿演化转换为底层哈密顿量的块编码。对于埃尔米特分解 $A=\sum_{j=1}^L \alpha_j H_j$ 给出的算子，我们以两种方式实例化此块编码结构，这两种方式的不同之处在于所需的哈密顿演化的实现方式。使用高阶 Trotterization，我们获得了 $A$ 的 $\varepsilon$ 近似块编码，仅具有一个辅助量子位和电路深度 $\widetilde O\big(L(\alpha/\varepsilon)^{o(1)}\big),$ 其中 $\alpha=\sum_j \alpha_j$。使用乘积公式，我们获得电路深度 $\widetilde O(L)$，代价是 $O(\log\log(1/\varepsilon))$ 辅助量子位。

我们的结构提供了标准 LCU 框架的替代方案，重点是减少辅助量子位的数量，同时保持（接近）最佳电路深度。

title: Compressive Spectrum Sensing via Spectral Multiplexing in Rydberg Atomic Receiver
abstract: Rydberg-atomic receivers exhibit exceptional sensitivity yet are fundamentally constrained by the narrow instantaneous bandwidth, limiting their practical deployment in broadband scenarios. Prior approaches typically expand the bandwidth by physically broadening the atomic response, which usually requires auxiliary electromagnetic fields or stringent parameter tuning, thereby increasing overall system complexity. Here, we propose a compressive spectral multiplexing framework implemented in a waveguide-coupled Rydberg atomic receiver using a frequency-modulated local oscillator (FMLO). The FMLO creates multiple parallel sensing channels that collectively constitute a physical compressive sensing matrix, generating multiple narrowband intermediate-frequency replicas of the input signal. Thus, a broadband microwave spectrum is projected onto a set of narrowband atomic responses. It is demonstrated that spectral information spanning a bandwidth of over 640 MHz can be effectively compressed into the intrinsic atomic bandwidth of 126 kHz, achieving a spectrum compression ratio exceeding 1000. Furthermore, these output replicas offer intrinsic measurement redundancy and facilitate signal-to-noise ratio enhancement. An approximate 10 dB gain is achieved in the required bit-energy-to-noise-power-density ratio for multi-channel communication via maximal-ratio combining. This approach requires no auxiliary fields or broadband electronics, providing a simple and scalable pathway for chip-scale quantum receivers, latency-critical sensing, and next-generation wireless communications.
summary:
里德堡原子接收器表现出卓越的灵敏度，但从根本上受到窄瞬时带宽的限制，限制了它们在宽带场景中的实际部署。现有方法通常通过物理加宽原子响应来扩​​展带宽，这通常需要辅助电磁场或严格的参数调整，从而增加整体系统的复杂性。在这里，我们提出了一种使用调频本地振荡器（FMLO）在波导耦合里德堡原子接收器中实现的压缩频谱复用框架。 FMLO 创建多个并行传感通道，这些通道共同构成物理压缩传感矩阵，生成输入信号的多个窄带中频副本。因此，宽带微波谱被投射到一组窄带原子响应上。事实证明，跨越640 MHz以上带宽的光谱信息可以有效地压缩到126 kHz的固有原子带宽中，实现超过1000的光谱压缩比。

此外，这些输出副本提供了固有的测量冗余并有利于信噪比的增强。通过最大比组合，多通道通信所需的比特能量与噪声功率密度比可实现大约 10 dB 的增益。这种方法不需要辅助场或宽带电子设备，为芯片级量子接收器、延迟关键型传感和下一代无线通信提供了简单且可扩展的途径。

title: Quantum sensing of aging transitions
abstract: The aging transition is a critical phenomenon in which collective dynamics deteriorate as the fraction of inactive quantum nodes exceeds a threshold, referred to as the aging transition point. Such transitions are relevant to a broad range of biological and physiological systems, and may play an important role in quantum information processing, particularly in the stability assessment and robustness control of quantum networks. Detecting the aging transition point is therefore crucial for predicting network breakdown, since it marks the critical threshold at which a quantum network abruptly loses its stable active state and enters a degraded inactive phase. Here we propose a quantum sensing strategy to locate this transition point using a single qubit probe coherently coupled to a small subset of oscillator nodes. As the inactive fraction p approaches the aging transition point, the excited-state population of the probe becomes highly sensitive to variations in p, leading to a pronounced enhancement of the Fisher information. This critical enhancement enables high-precision estimation of the transition point. Remarkably, this enhancement survives even in the classical regime for the oscillators, where the Fisher information increases dramatically as p approaches the transition region. Our results establish a feasible route to sensing aging transitions in oscillator networks and provide a metrological perspective on critical phenomena in quantum many-body systems.
summary:
老化转变是一种关键现象，当不活动量子节点的比例超过阈值（称为老化转变点）时，集体动力学会恶化。这种转变与广泛的生物和生理系统相关，并且可能在量子信息处理中发挥重要作用，特别是在量子网络的稳定性评估和鲁棒性控制中。因此，检测老化转变点对于预测网络故障至关重要，因为它标志着量子网络突然失去稳定活动状态并进入退化非活动阶段的临界阈值。在这里，我们提出了一种量子传感策略，使用与一小部分振荡器节点相干耦合的单个量子位探针来定位该转变点。当非活性部分 p 接近老化转变点时，探针的激发态群体对 p 的变化变得高度敏感，导致费希尔信息显着增强。这一关键的增强功能可以实现转变点的高精度估计。

值得注意的是，即使在振荡器的经典状态下，这种增强仍然存在，其中费希尔信息随着 p 接近过渡区域而急剧增加。我们的研究结果建立了一条可行的途径来感知振荡器网络中的老化转变，并为量子多体系统中的关键现象提供了计量学视角。

title: Local distinguishability of six bipartite orthogonal product states
abstract: It is necessary to investigate the local distinguishability of orthogonal quantum state sets, as their adoption in protocol design helps diminish quantum state transmission and cut operational costs. In this paper, we explore the local distinguishability of six orthogonal product states (OPSs) on any bipartite quantum system. We classify different sets of six bipartite OPSs into eight categories by using the vectors of the numbers of pairwise orthogonality relations, where any two states are orthogonal on only one subsystem within each set. We find that these eight categories contain a total of 78 distinct cases, all but five of which are perfectly distinguishable via local operations and classical communication (LOCC). Furthermore, we discuss the local distinguishability of those five distinct cases in detail. Our work explicitly characterizes the local distinguishability of six bipartite OPSs.
summary: 有必要研究正交量子态集的局部可区分性，因为它们在协议设计中的采用有助于减少量子态传输并降低运营成本。在本文中，我们探讨了任何二分量子系统上六个正交积态（OPS）的局部可区分性。我们通过使用成对正交关系的数量向量将不同的六个二分 OPS 集合分为八类，其中任何两个状态仅在每个集合中的一个子系统上正交。我们发现这八个类别总共包含 78 个不同的案例，除了其中五个之外，所有案例都可以通过本地操作和经典通信 (LOCC) 完全区分。此外，我们详细讨论了这五个不同案例的局部可区分性。我们的工作明确地描述了六个二分 OPS 的局部可区分性。

title: Undamped Modes in an N-Qubit Heisenberg Chain with Collective Dissipation
abstract: We investigate the undamped behaviors in a spin-1/2 Heisenberg chain coupled with an environment via collective spin jump operators. Using the Bethe ansatz basis, we show that undamped modes exist for any chain length N >= 3. These modes remain robust against variations in the system parameters, including the specific form of the collective dissipation, and the external field. Exploiting the Bethe ansatz solution, we further characterize the number of undamped modes and their oscillation frequencies, uncovering long-lived coherent dynamics in open integrable quantum systems.
summary: 我们通过集体自旋跳跃算子研究了自旋 1/2 海森堡链与环境耦合的无阻尼行为。使用 Bethe ansatz 基础，我们表明对于任何链长度 N >= 3 都存在无阻尼模式。这些模式对于系统参数的变化保持鲁棒性，包括集体耗散的特定形式和外部场。利用 Bethe ansatz 解，我们进一步表征了无阻尼模式的数量及其振荡频率，揭示了开放可积量子系统中长寿命的相干动力学。

title: Quantum Convolutional Autoencoders for Reconstruction-Based Anomaly Detection
abstract: Quantum convolutional neural networks (QCNNs) have become increasingly popular in quantum machine learning (QML) due to their efficient parameterization and hierarchical representation of quantum information. Anomaly detection is an important machine learning task with applications across a wide range of domains, including scientific data analysis. In this work, we adapt a QCNN architecture into a quantum autoencoder (QAE) framework for reconstruction-based anomaly detection. The models are trained in a semi-supervised manner on normal samples to reconstruct feature-extracted and dimensionally reduced time-series data, with reconstruction error used as an anomaly score. We investigate two quantum convolutional autoencoder architectures that differ in their treatment of latent information: a hierarchical architecture in which information remains distributed across the circuit and a bottleneck-based architecture in which information is explicitly compressed and reconstructed using additional decoder qubits. The size of the quantum latent space is varied to study its influence on reconstruction accuracy and anomaly detection performance. The approaches are benchmarked against both a variational quantum circuit and a comparable classical baseline using a real-world exoplanet anomaly-detection dataset. Results indicate a trade-off between latent-space size and model capacity, while also suggesting that explicit latent-space compression through a quantum bottleneck can improve anomaly detection performance relative to architectures that retain information throughout the circuit.
summary:
量子卷积神经网络（QCNN）由于其高效的参数化和量子信息的分层表示而在量子机器学习（QML）中变得越来越流行。异常检测是一项重要的机器学习任务，其应用涉及广泛的领域，包括科学数据分析。在这项工作中，我们将 QCNN 架构改编为量子自动编码器 (QAE) 框架，用于基于重建的异常检测。该模型在正常样本上以半监督方式进行训练，以重建提取特征并降维的时间序列数据，并将重建误差用作异常分数。我们研究了两种在处理潜在信息方面有所不同的量子卷积自动编码器架构：一种是分层架构，其中信息保持分布在整个电路中；另一种是基于瓶颈的架构，其中信息使用额外的解码器量子位进行显式压缩和重建。改变量子潜在空间的大小以研究其对重建精度和异常检测性能的影响。

这些方法使用真实世界的系外行星异常检测数据集，针对变分量子电路和可比较的经典基线进行基准测试。结果表明，潜在空间大小和模型容量之间存在权衡，同时还表明，相对于在整个电路中保留信息的架构，通过量子瓶颈进行显式潜在空间压缩可以提高异常检测性能。

title: A Structure Theorem for Phase-Space Representations of Continuous-Variable Quantum Error-Correcting Codes
abstract: In this paper we connect the structure theorem for quasiprobability representation of generalised probabilistic theories to bosonic quantum error correction codes, giving both a general phase-space representation for continuous-variable error-correcting codes, and showing as specific examples the phase-space representations obtained through this method for Gottesman-Knill-Preskill codes, cat codes, and binomial codes. This representation allows us to define both generally and for each of these codes the mathematical structure in phase space that errors can take, which we show both abstractly and for the specific example of single photon loss errors.
summary: 在本文中，我们将广义概率理论的准概率表示的结构定理与玻色子量子纠错码联系起来，给出了连续变量纠错码的一般相空间表示，并作为具体示例展示了通过该方法获得的 Gottesman-Knill-Preskill 码、cat 码和二项式码的相空间表示。这种表示形式使我们能够一般性地以及为每个代码定义错误可能采用的相空间中的数学结构，我们以抽象方式和单光子损失错误的具体示例来展示这一结构。

title: Computable measures of fermionic non-Gaussianity from the covariance matrix
abstract: Fermionic non-Gaussianity, or fermionic magic, is a key resource underlying the computational complexity of fermionic quantum systems, yet tractable and operationally meaningful ways to quantify it remain limited. We address this challenge by developing a convex resource theory of fermionic non-Gaussianity and introducing two families of computable measures for pure fermionic states, both derived from the Williamson normal form of the covariance matrix. The first family, occupation number entropies, is defined as the Tsallis-$\alpha$ entropy of the occupation numbers. We prove that one member of this family is monotonic under Gaussian protocols, establishing it as a computable convex resource monotone. It consequently lower bounds the number of non-Gaussian gates needed for state preparation. The second family, natural-orbital participation entropies, is given by the Rényi-$\alpha$ entropy of the squared amplitudes of the state in the natural-orbital basis, defined by the eigenvectors of the covariance matrix. These measures quantify state compressibility in this basis and thus upper bound the classical simulation cost in an orthonormal Gaussian basis. We analyze both families for stabilizer and translation-invariant states, where they simplify and reveal additional structure. We further study representative examples, including random SWAP-doped matchgate circuits and the bond-modulated XXZ model, highlighting the role of non-Gaussianity in many-body phenomena. Our work establishes a resource-theoretic framework for computable fermionic non-Gaussianity that unifies notions arising across quantum information, condensed-matter physics, and quantum chemistry, opening new directions for studying the complexity of quantum many-body systems and providing practical tools to assess the classical simulability of fermionic states relevant for quantum advantage.
summary:
费米子非高斯性或费米子魔力是费米子量子系统计算复杂性的关键资源，但易于处理且具有操作意义的量化方法仍然有限。我们通过发展费米子非高斯性的凸资源理论并引入两个纯费米子态的可计算测度来解决这一挑战，这两个测度都源自协方差矩阵的威廉姆森范式。第一个家族，职业数熵，被定义为职业数的 Tsallis-$\alpha$ 熵。我们证明这个家族的一个成员在高斯协议下是单调的，将其建立为可计算的凸资源单调。因此，它降低了状态准备所需的非高斯门的数量。第二个家族，自然轨道参与熵，由自然轨道基础中状态振幅平方的 Rényi-$\alpha$ 熵给出，由协方差矩阵的特征向量定义。这些措施量化了该基础上的状态可压缩性，从而量化了正交高斯基础上经典模拟成本的上限。

我们分析了这两个家族的稳定态和平移不变态，它们简化并揭示了额外的结构。我们进一步研究了代表性示例，包括随机 SWAP 掺杂匹配门电路和键调制 XXZ 模型，强调了非高斯性在多体现象中的作用。我们的工作为可计算费米子非高斯性建立了一个资源理论框架，统一了量子信息、凝聚态物理和量子化学中产生的概念，为研究量子多体系统的复杂性开辟了新方向，并提供了实用工具来评估与量子优势相关的费米子态的经典可模拟性。

title: Bockstein braiding statistics
abstract: Braiding statistics, from the Aharonov-Bohm phase to anyons in fractional quantum Hall systems, play a central role in quantum physics. For $p$- and $q$-dimensional excitations in $d$ spatial dimensions, ordinary braiding requires $p+q=d-2$. In a field-theoretic description of $\mathbb Z_N$ excitations, ordinary braiding is described by the linking response $(2\pi i/N)\int A_{d-p}\cup B_{d-q}$, where $A_{d-p}$ and $B_{d-q}$ are background fields coupled to the two excitation types. In this work, we identify new mutual statistics in the adjacent case $p+q=d-1$. For two invertible excitations obeying $\mathbb Z_N$ fusion, one can choose local creation operators $X$ and $Y$ whose supports have a staggered one-dimensional overlap. The closed unitary process $W_N(X,Y)=(Y^{-1}X^{-1})^N(YX)^N$ measures the resulting mutual statistic. Its field-theory description is $(2\pi i/N)\int A_{d-p}\cup\beta_N B_{d-q}$, where $\beta_N$ is the Bockstein operation; we therefore call the invariant Bockstein braiding statistics. The construction yields particle-particle statistics in one dimension, particle-loop statistics in two dimensions, and loop-loop or particle-membrane statistics in three dimensions. Nontrivial Bockstein braiding statistics obstructs simultaneous condensation of the two $\mathbb Z_N$ excitations. It also rules out a fully symmetric gapped phase for systems with the corresponding mixed anomaly and implies symmetry fractionalization when one of the $\mathbb Z_N$ symmetries is broken.
summary:
从阿哈罗诺夫-玻姆相到分数量子霍尔系统中的任意子，编织统计在量子物理学中发挥着核心作用。对于 $d$ 空间维度中的 $p$ 和 $q$ 维激励，普通编织需要 $p+q=d-2$。在 $\mathbb Z_N$ 激励的场论描述中，普通编织由链接响应 $(2\pi i/N)\int A_{d-p}\cup B_{d-q}$ 描述，其中 $A_{d-p}$ 和 $B_{d-q}$ 是耦合到两种激励类型的背景场。在这项工作中，我们在相邻情况 $p+q=d-1$ 中确定了新的互统计量。对于服从 $\mathbb Z_N$ 融合的两个可逆激励，可以选择局部创建算子 $X$ 和 $Y$，其支撑具有交错的一维重叠。封闭酉过程 $W_N(X,Y)=(Y^{-1}X^{-1})^N(YX)^N$ 测量所得的相互统计量。其场论描述为$(2\pi i/N)\int A_{d-p}\cup\beta_N B_{d-q}$，其中$\beta_N$是Bockstein运算；因此，我们将其称为不变的 Bockstein 编织统计。

该结构产生一维的粒子-粒子统计、二维的粒子-环统计以及三维的环-环或粒子-膜统计。重要的 Bockstein 编织统计阻碍了两个 $\mathbb Z_N$ 激励的同时凝聚。它还排除了具有相应混合异常的系统的完全对称带隙相，并且当 $\mathbb Z_N$ 对称性之一被破坏时意味着对称性分数化。

title: Kardar-Parisi-Zhang dynamics in an open integrable system: beyond the spontaneous-symmetry-breaking ansatz
abstract: The universality of dynamical scaling laws constitutes a cornerstone in the theoretical understanding of quantum many-body systems, particularly in non-equilibrium settings. Recent advancements have proposed a phenomenological ansatz based on spontaneous symmetry breaking (SSB) to unify the description of charge transport in open quantum systems. However, it remains unclear under which conditions it fails to capture the emergent hydrodynamics and if it does break down, whether nontrivial dynamics emerge. In this work we show that Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) dynamics in an open integrable model (the B3 model), rather than diffusion from SSB, emerges. We find that the B3 model is equivalent to two interacting asymmetric XXZ spin chains and the ansatz can only capture the influence of the inter-chain interactions. When the initial state is appropriate, the asymmetric XXZ structure dominates the dynamics, which gives KPZ scaling behavior even when the hopping rate becomes negative. Our work motivates theory of charge transport in open systems beyond the ansatz based on SSB.
summary: 动力学标度定律的普遍性构成了量子多体系统理论理解的基石，特别是在非平衡环境中。最近的进展提出了一种基于自发对称破缺（SSB）的唯象模拟，以统一开放量子系统中电荷传输的描述。然而，目前尚不清楚在什么条件下它无法捕捉到出现的流体动力学，以及如果它确实崩溃了，是否会出现不平凡的动力学。在这项工作中，我们展示了开放可积模型（B3 模型）中的 Kardar-Parisi-Zhang (KPZ) 动力学，而不是来自 SSB 的扩散。我们发现 B3 模型相当于两个相互作用的不对称 XXZ 自旋链，而 ansatz 只能捕获链间相互作用的影响。当初始状态合适时，不对称的 XXZ 结构在动力学中占主导地位，即使跳跃率变为负值，也会产生 KPZ 缩放行为。我们的工作激发了基于 SSB 的模拟之外的开放系统中的电荷传输理论。

title: Copying Quantum States
abstract: The no-broadcasting theorem in quantum information says that a set of states on a quantum system admits a common broadcasting (copying) operation if and only if their density matrices belong to a commuting family. We discuss and prove this theorem, as well as the closely related no-cloning theorem in the context of quantum probability theory, i.e. in the category of (finite dimensional) C-star-algebras with unital completely positive maps.
summary: 量子信息中的无广播定理表明，当且仅当量子系统上的一组状态的密度矩阵属于交换族时，它们才允许公共广播（复制）操作。我们讨论并证明了这个定理，以及在量子概率论背景下密切相关的不可克隆定理，即在具有单位完全正映射的（有限维）C星代数范畴中。

title: A Quantum-Walk Representation of Color-Ordered MHV Scattering Amplitudes
abstract: We introduce a graph-theoretic framework for representing color-ordered maximally helicity violating (MHV) scattering amplitudes in quantum chromodynamics using coined quantum walks on permutation trees. Each root-to-terminal path corresponds to a distinct color ordering of the external gluons, while local transition amplitudes are assigned according to the spinor-product structure of the Parke--Taylor amplitudes. The walk evolves in coherent superpositions over permutation sectors, giving a dynamical picture of the underlying combinatorics. A quantum-channel formulation based on Kraus operators is also introduced to describe sector-resolved contributions, while a weighted collection operator coherently combines the terminal sectors at a common reference node. A quantum Fourier transform on the coin space is then employed to combine the encoded contributions into the corresponding color-decomposed amplitude. Together, these constructions establish a unified graph-based framework connecting permutation trees, quantum walks, and open quantum systems providing a framework for quantum algorithms to simulate scattering processes in quantum field theory. As an example, numerical results for low-point gluon amplitudes demonstrate that the proposed representation faithfully captures the characteristic Parke--Taylor structure and is consistent with analytical results.
summary:
我们引入了一个图论框架，用于使用排列树上的创造量子游走来表示量子色动力学中颜色排序的最大螺旋性破坏（MHV）散射幅度。每个根到终端路径对应于外部胶子的不同颜色排序，而局部跃迁振幅根据帕克-泰勒振幅的旋量积结构来分配。行走在排列扇区上的连贯叠加中演化，给出了底层组合的动态图景。还引入了基于克劳斯算子的量子信道公式来描述扇区解析的贡献，而加权收集算子在公共参考节点处连贯地组合了终端扇区。然后采用硬币空间上的量子傅里叶变换将编码的贡献组合成相应的颜色分解幅度。这些结构共同建立了一个统一的基于图的框架，连接排列树、量子行走和开放量子系统，为量子算法模拟量子场论中的散射过程提供了一个框架。

例如，低点胶子振幅的数值结果表明，所提出的表示忠实地捕获了特征帕克-泰勒结构，并且与分析结果一致。

title: Quantum mutual information as a robust probe of integrability in open quantum systems
abstract: The dynamics of a quantum system encode signatures of whether the underlying Hamiltonian is integrable or chaotic, giving rise to the concept of quantum information scrambling through the properties of the resulting dynamical states or operators. We introduce an information-theoretic framework based on the Haar-averaged sum of total correlations (aSTC), together with average genuine multipartite entanglement generated dynamically from initially fully separable states, as robust probes of quantum information scrambling. Using the long-range quantum XYZ spin model in transverse and longitudinal magnetic fields, whose integrable limit is the nearest-neighbor transverse XY model, we demonstrate that the long-time average and, more importantly, the temporal fluctuations of the aSTC provide a faithful and system-size-independent signature of integrable and chaotic dynamics, similar to the conventional measure of scrambling, out-of-time-ordered correlator (OTOC). When the system is in contact with the thermal reservoir and system-bath coupling follows Markovianity, we find that the fluctuations of the aSTC and OTOC continue to distinguish integrable and chaotic dynamics only at intermediate times. However, we observe that in the non-Markovian domain, information backflow restores the scrambling dynamics, enabling the aSTC to retain its distinguishing power even at long times. Interestingly, we exhibit that, under Markovian amplitude damping and non-Markovian dephasing noise, the temporal fluctuations of the aSTC can discriminate between integrability and non-integrability in the weak Markovian regime, even when OTOC fails to do so.
summary:
量子系统的动力学编码了基础哈密顿量是可积的还是混沌的特征，从而产生了通过所得动态状态或算子的属性进行量子信息加扰的概念。我们引入了一种基于哈尔平均总相关性和（aSTC）的信息论框架，以及从最初完全可分离态动态生成的平均真实多部分纠缠，作为量子信息置乱的鲁棒探针。使用横向和纵向磁场中的长程量子 XYZ 自旋模型（其可积极限是最近邻横向 XY 模型），我们证明了 aSTC 的长期平均值，更重要的是，aSTC 的时间波动提供了可积和混沌动力学的忠实且与系统尺寸无关的特征，类似于加扰、乱序相关器 (OTOC) 的传统测量。

当系统与热储层接触并且系统-浴耦合遵循马尔可夫性时，我们发现aSTC和OTOC的波动仅在中间时间继续区分可积动力学和混沌动力学。然而，我们观察到，在非马尔可夫域中，信息回流恢复了扰乱动态，使得 aSTC 即使在很长一段时间内也能保持其区分能力。有趣的是，我们证明，在马尔可夫振幅阻尼和非马尔可夫相移噪声下，aSTC 的时间波动可以区分弱马尔可夫体系中的可积性和不可积性，即使 OTOC 无法做到这一点。

title: Topological Control of Quantum Chaos Diagnostics: OTOCs, Spectral Statistics, and Information Scrambling in Ising Model
abstract: We investigate the integrability-to-chaos transition and information scrambling in Ising spin networks via a graph-theoretic formulation. Modeling spins as vertices and interactions via adjacency matrices across path, Erdős--Rényi, and Watts--Strogatz topologies, we demonstrate that long-range couplings and heterogeneous degree distributions drastically accelerate quantum information propagation. The Hamiltonian comprises local and normalized non-local interactions; tuning the non-local coupling and field heterogeneity drives integrability breaking. To quantify scrambling, we employ bipartite mutual and tripartite information. Increasing non-local interactions drives tripartite information to large negative values, signaling deep information scrambling. Out-of-time-order correlators (OTOCs) exhibit exponential early-time growth, yielding quantum Lyapunov exponents that scale systematically with parameters governing the chaotic regime. Complementing this, Krylov complexity reveals rapid operator growth in the chaotic phase, synchronizing with OTOC and mutual information dynamics. Spectrally, the transition manifests as a shift from Poissonian to Wigner--Dyson level spacing statistics. The spectral form factor (SFF) exhibits the characteristic slope-dip-ramp-plateau structure, enabling the extraction of Thouless and Heisenberg times. Crucially, a reduced Thouless time strongly correlates with accelerated informational and operator scrambling. Ultimately, this work establishes a unified framework bridging network topology with information-theoretic, operator, and spectral diagnostics, offering profound insights into thermalization and non-equilibrium dynamics in quantum many-body systems.
summary:
我们通过图论公式研究了伊辛自旋网络中可积到混沌的转变和信息置乱。通过跨路径、Erdős-Rényi 和 Watts-Strogatz 拓扑的邻接矩阵将自旋建模为顶点和相互作用，我们证明了长程耦合和异质度分布极大地加速了量子信息传播。哈密​​顿量包括局部和标准化的非局部相互作用；调整非局部耦合和场异质性会导致可积分性破坏。为了量化加扰，我们采用二方相互信息和三方信息。非本地交互的增加使三方信息达到很大的负值，标志着深度信息的扰乱。乱序相关器 (OTOC) 表现出指数早期增长，产生随控制混沌状态的参数系统缩放的量子李雅普诺夫指数。作为补充，Krylov 复杂性揭示了混乱阶段运营商的快速增长，与 OTOC 和互信息动态同步。

从光谱上看，这种转变表现为从泊松统计到维格纳-戴森能级间距统计的转变。光谱形状因子 (SFF) 呈现出特有的斜坡-倾角-斜坡-平台结构，能够提取 Thouless 和 Heisenberg 时间。至关重要的是，Thouless 时间的减少与信息和操作员混乱的加速密切相关。最终，这项工作建立了一个统一的框架，将网络拓扑与信息论、算子和光谱诊断联系起来，为量子多体系统中的热化和非平衡动力学提供了深刻的见解。
